tasks.title: Lai 测试更多 layer 数量与推理部署：10 张图批测
tasks.description: Lai 继续测试更多 layer count 和推理部署，挑选 10 张代表性 robot/manipulation 图片做 layer decomposition 批测，整理结果发群并同步 dashboard。Acceptance: 10 张输入图、每张不同 layer 数设置、推理部署命令或服务入口、输出 layer/manifest、重组预览、失败样例、速度/显存/稳定性记录、推荐 layer count 与是否可进入视频测试。
tasks.result: Closed by early method-selection decision on 2026-06-18 rather than by expanding to the full 10-image batch. Layered Image Policy evidence from 2026-06-17 shows Qwen Image-Layered can specify layer count, but cannot specify the semantic content of each layer; prompt constraints behave like a caption and do not force robot/object/background separation. The shared Qwen outputs show merged or missing semantic entities, residual/shadow/background-support layers, failed pure-background rendering, and weak pillow/background completion. Yongxi also reported the ICML/RevealLayer-style result as unusable for the current robot scene. Decision: pass/drop Qwen Image-Layered and RevealLayer/ICML-style direct layer generation as short-term practical routes; keep them only as background/comparison references. Do not spend more effort on the 10-image Qwen layer-count batch unless a new model/control API appears. Failure gallery saved under dashboard/assets/umi-qwen-layer-failure-20260618-{0,1,2,3}.jpg. Next route: SAM3/SAM mask tracking + GPT/inpaint or VACE video inpainting, plus SuperSVG/LIVE/SAM-contour SVG sidecar probes, optional StarVector/OmniSVG probes, and RoboTwin/MaskWAM mask audits; keep SAMVG as paper/reference unless code appears.

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: ClawCross WeChat check of Layered Image Policy on 2026-06-18: Yongxi shared the current Qwen outputs and confirmed layer count is controllable, but each layer's semantic coverage is not. Official prompt behavior is effectively caption-like; attempts to force required layer contents did not work. Boris concluded it was not meaningful to continue, Yongxi agreed, and Yongxi also said the ICML/RevealLayer-style result was not worth posting. Marking the task done as a negative result / early stop: Qwen and RevealLayer are passed over for the practical robot-layer pipeline.

tasks.description: 为 Ego World + IDM 准备 Image-Layered 可训练数据。先小规模验证 robot / object-interaction / scene 三层 pipeline：以 RevealLayer (arXiv:2605.11818) 作为 Stage 2 build-upon 主路线，结合语义分割或 mask tracking，把 bounding-box / region guidance 改造成 robot、object/contact、occluder、background 的 RGBA layer pseudo-label；Qwen Image-Layered / ChatGPT image-agent / segment+inpaint / 纯视频模型去 robot layer prompt 保留为对照。robot layer 用于 IDM / pose / VO 辅助，object layer 用于过程奖励和 RL 自监督，scene layer 用于 RoboEngine-style 物理/任务感知背景替换。Acceptance: 少量 episode 的分层数据样例、每层命名与 mask/video/SVG 输出 schema、失败样例、QA 指标、temporal consistency/recomposition 检查，以及是否扩成大规模自造数据集的判断。
tasks.result: Closed after the small SVG/layer-data feasibility pass and WeChat evidence review. Decision: RevealLayer remains only a reference/negative route for the current robot scene, while SVG 化 should be scoped to layer mask / contour / contact metadata sidecars. Raster truth stays as mask.png, rgba.png, inpainted_background.png, and video clips. A one-frame MolmoAct robot-couch pilot in ~/Downloads/molmoact_svg_layer_pilot_20260617 defines robot_visible, object_contact, and scene_background layer outputs plus manifest/QA/failure notes; it is a schema probe, not a scalable training dataset. The follow-up TODO is now the SVG-specific SuperSVG/LIVE still-frame and short-clip probe, with StarVector/OmniSVG optional and SAMVG kept as paper/reference until code appears.

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: User direction 2026-06-16: arXiv:2605.11818 RevealLayer fits UMI World Model Stage 2 almost exactly and should be treated as a build-upon foundation. Execution route: start from RevealLayer-style occlusion-aware RGB -> RGBA layer decomposition, replace generic object boxes with robot/object/contact/occluder guidance, run on representative UMI frames, then add temporal consistency and multi-view synchronization before scaling. Keep Qwen Image-Layered, ChatGPT/Photoshop PSD, and segment+inpaint as baselines/probes, not the main Stage 2 foundation.

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: Layered Image Policy sync 2026-06-16: group review converged on a concrete Stage 2 short-term route. Boris shared a 15.3 MB ChatGPT split-layer PSD plus still-image comparisons on a real robot-bed scene; the team judged the GPT still-image decomposition qualitatively strong, but recomposition still had visible alignment errors and missing/shifted content (for example the pillow / gripper layout did not perfectly reassemble). The same discussion judged the first RevealLayer / Qwen-style sample weaker than the GPT still-image result on this scene, so RevealLayer should remain the research build-upon foundation while practical data curation keeps GPT/PSD and segment+inpaint alive as stronger immediate probes. Meng Ziyang then shared a 6.7 s prior SAM3 video-segmentation demo; local frame review shows a stable tracked robot-arm mask/box across sampled frames, which supports using video mask tracking as the temporal backbone. Current execution direction from the group: iterate segment + inpaint to create video-ready layered outputs, keep SAM3-style tracking for stable masks, store today's artifacts/results, and let Yongxi run a Qwen-Image-Layered comparison next.

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: Layered Image Policy sync 2026-06-17: Meng Ziyang shared a SAM3 segmentation + GPT inpaint batch, and Boris/Yongxi judged it very strong. This makes mask tracking plus GPT/inpaint background completion the current strongest practical path for short-term video layer data. Yongxi's Qwen Image-Layered comparison clarified Qwen's failure mode: it tends to group visually/physically connected regions instead of semantic entities; increasing layers can produce residual, occlusion, shadow, or background-support layers rather than separate objects; pure background output may fail; pillow/background completion is weak. Next step from the group is to test more robot frames from MolmoAct while keeping Qwen as a diagnostic baseline, SAM3+inpaint as the practical probe, and RevealLayer as the Stage 2 build-upon foundation. GPU access was discussed in chat, but credentials are intentionally not stored in the dashboard.

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: SVG route decision 2026-06-17: SVG 化 is feasible, but only as the structured layer-mask / contour / contact-metadata representation, not as a replacement for full photorealistic robot video frames. Mainline output should keep raster truth (`mask.png`, `rgba.png`, `inpainted_background.png`, video clips) and add SVG paths or polygons for robot, object/contact, hand, occluder, and optional scene regions. Most reliable path: SAM/SAM2/SAM3 mask tracking -> contour tracing -> SVG `<path>` / polygon, with rasterize-back QA. LIVE and SAMVG are useful still-frame probes for layer-wise vectorization, but robot videos will suffer from frame-to-frame path-topology changes and excessive path fragmentation on natural textures. DiffVG is useful as a differentiable rasterizer / SVG optimization backend, while VectorFusion and SVGDreamer are text-to-SVG/icon/sketch generation references, not faithful robot-layer label generators. Minimal experiment: 3 episodes, 20-50 frames each; outputs include `robot_layer.svg`, `object_contact_layer.svg`, `occluder_layer.svg`, optional `scene_regions.svg`, paired raster masks/RGBA/inpaint outputs, and `layer_manifest.json`. QA gates: SVG rasterize-back mask IoU > 0.97, bounded path/vertex count, frame-to-frame bbox jitter and mask IoU, path topology-change report, recomposition SSIM/LPIPS or manual score, plus failure gallery for Qwen merged connected regions, fragmented SVG paths, thin gripper/cable/shadow mistrace, and texture-heavy background not suitable for SVG.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body: Completion evidence 2026-06-17: local pilot package saved at /Users/boris/Downloads/molmoact_svg_layer_pilot_20260617. Generated outputs: raw/source.png; layers/{robot_visible,object_contact,scene_background}_{mask,rgba}.png; layers/{robot_visible,object_contact}.svg; layers/scene_background_inpaint_proxy.png; schema/layer_manifest.json; qa/metrics.json; qa/failure_examples.md; previews/recomposition.png and layer_overlay.png. Metrics: recomposition_l1_rgb=0.0 for the one-frame pseudo-label recomposition; SVG rasterize-back IoU=1.0 for robot_visible and object_contact polygons; area ratios robot_visible=0.14983, object_contact=0.17739, scene_background=0.67278. Explicit limitation: this is coarse hand-polygon pseudo-label evidence, not a scalable training dataset, and temporal consistency is not measured on the single frame. Recommendation split after 2026-06-19 update: use mask tracking + GPT/inpaint or VACE for raster completion, but use SuperSVG/LIVE or SAM-mask-to-contour tracing for the SVG sidecar experiment; StarVector/OmniSVG are optional probes and SAMVG remains paper/reference unless code appears.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body: WeChat evidence check 2026-06-17 via ClawCross wx_guarded.py: Layered Image Policy contains prior tests/discussion of RevealLayer, ChatGPT split-layer PSD, SAM3 + GPT inpaint, and Qwen Image-Layered; UMI World Model contains earlier temporal segmentation / AC-WM discussion. Targeted searches inside both groups for SVG, SAMVG, LIVE, DiffVG, VectorFusion, SVGDreamer, 矢量, Bézier, path, contour, and 轮廓 returned 0 hits. Correction: the local Downloads pilot was a hand-polygon SVG sidecar/schema probe, not a vectorization implementation run. Superseding update 2026-06-19: because SAMVG code is unavailable, SVG-specific next step should test SuperSVG/LIVE-style layer-wise vectorization and rasterize-back QA, with StarVector/OmniSVG optional and SAM-contour tracing as the practical baseline.

tasks.title: 跑 SuperSVG / LIVE 的 MolmoAct SVG layer probe
tasks.description: 专门验证 SVG 化，而不是重复 segment+inpaint/Qwen/GPT：根据 2026-06-18/19 yongxi 私聊更新，SAMVG 没有开源代码，短期把 SAMVG 替代物定为 SuperSVG；SuperSVG 和 LIVE 作为主 SVG 化验证，StarVector / OmniSVG 作为备选 probe，简单 mask-contour tracing 作为 practical baseline。从 MolmoAct 或 Hoi 先选 3 个 episode，每个抽 20-50 帧，对 robot、object/contact、hand/occluder、scene_regions 做 SVG sidecar。输出每层 layer.svg、mask.png、rgba.png、inpainted_background.png、layer_manifest.json 和 failure gallery。QA: SVG rasterize-back mask IoU > 0.97；path count / vertex count 不爆炸；frame-to-frame bbox jitter、mask IoU、path topology change；recomposition SSIM/LPIPS 或人工评分。失败记录：Qwen merged connected regions、SVG path too fragmented、thin gripper/cable/shadow mistrace、background texture unsuitable for SVG。结论要判断 SVG 是否适合作为结构层/annotation 层，而不是替代 RGBA video layer。
tasks.result: Closed on 2026-06-22 per Boris: UMI should keep only three open TODOs now (VACE video inpainting, global layered dataset plan, and FoundationPose layer utility). This item is no longer an active UMI TODO; preserve its prior notes as background/context.

Keep simple SAM/SAM2/SAM3 mask -> contour SVG as the practical baseline, DiffVG only as an optimization/rasterization backend, and raster mask/RGBA/video truth alongside SVG sidecars.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body: Route decision: SVG 化可行，但只作为分层 mask/contour/contact/trajectory 的结构化表示；RGB/alpha layer 仍保留 PNG/video。短期验收以 SAM mask -> SVG contour -> rasterize-back QA 为准；SAMVG is no longer an active implementation target unless code appears, so SuperSVG replaces it as the near-term SAMVG-like candidate. LIVE remains the layer-wise still-frame vectorization baseline; StarVector / OmniSVG are optional SVG probes; DiffVG is useful only as differentiable rasterization/optimization support. VectorFusion/SVGDreamer are text-to-SVG/icon/sketch style references and should not be the faithful robot-layer label mainline.

tasks.title: 形成 sensor online calibration v0 spec / benchmark
tasks.description: 把 online sensor calibration / drift adaptation 点子落成可执行 v0 spec。范围包括温度、磁场、光照、震动、warm-up、安装变化、老化导致的 camera/RGB-D/IMU/magnetometer/tactile/force/proximity 漂移。Acceptance: 1) 列出每类 sensor 的可学习 calibration state、可观测信号、不可观测/退回条件；2) 明确 classical offline calibration anchor + learning residual 的方法，而不是让神经网络静默改标定；3) 设计 D405/RGB-D + fiducial/robot-FK 的最小 benchmark，覆盖 warm-up、lighting、slight remount、magnetic/electrical interference；4) 指标包括 reprojection error、depth-RGB alignment、robot-frame pose error、VIO/SLAM residual、downstream policy/world-model sensitivity、false correction rate；5) 输出 episode manifest 字段：calib_state、confidence、observability、correction_delta、rollback/recapture flag；6) 给出接入 Real-Robot Infra、UMI/Tri-View、VTLA、Human Intention XLA 的边界。

Front-line update 2026-06-16 from the Boris <-> Yongxi Lai chat: the immediate blocker is wrist semantics rather than generic bring-up. GELLO wrist mapping to Franka is still off by about 90 degrees, and VIVE wrist retargeting is still hard to tune. Current control split under discussion: keep GELLO for the direct joint-correspondence arm path, and evaluate whether wrist motion should instead come from VIVE despite the current retargeting difficulty.

tasks.title: DexGello: learn from failure data with phase-importance metric
tasks.description: 探索一个用于灵巧手 long-horizon 任务的失败数据学习指标：不是把失败轨迹整段拿去学，而是从失败 rollout 中区分有意义的前序阶段和真正失败阶段。目标 metric 要能判断每个阶段的信息价值 / 重要性，例如 grasp 阶段 object/contact 相关指标升高，接触临界、滑移、预抓取姿态、目标物状态变化、operator hesitation 等信号升高；DAgger rollout 中人类介入接管的片段也应给出更高重要性。训练策略：失败轨迹里失败前的高重要阶段可以作为 imitation / replay / curriculum 样本，失败动作本身默认不学或低权重，只保留为 failure label / recovery trigger。候选真机 long-horizon demo：1) 用扫帚把物体扫进撮箕；2) 对魔方/方块连续拧两下 90 度。验收：1) 定义至少 2-3 个 metric 候选（object-centric progress/contact score、human takeover/intervention score、policy uncertainty/nonconformity、phase transition score 等）；2) 在 DexGello episode schema 里标出 phase、success/failure、takeover、contact/object state 字段；3) 用 3-5 条成功/失败/接管样例做离线打分表，其中至少包含一个 longer-horizon demo 的分阶段样例；4) 给出如何切片成 learnable pre-failure segments 与 non-learn failure segments；5) 接到 DAgger / diffusion-policy / world-model training 的 sample-weight 或 curriculum 接口。
tasks.result: Archived on 2026-06-16 per user direction. DexGello should not keep an expanded dashboard TODO list; actual progress is tracked in the project note from the 2026-06-16 Boris <-> Yongxi Lai chat about wrist mapping, VIVE retargeting, and a likely wrist-part redesign.

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: Seeded from user request on 2026-06-13: learn from failure data by extracting meaningful information from failed dexterous-hand trajectories. Long-horizon task phases should get an importance metric; high-value pre-failure phases can be learned, while the actual failed stage should not be imitated. Human takeover during DAgger rollout should raise the metric.

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: User clarified on 2026-06-13 that the Learn-from-failure-data metric likely needs more long-horizon true-robot demos. Added broom-to-dustpan sweeping and two consecutive 90-degree cube turns as candidate data sources in Real-Robot Demos.

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: Reference update from user-provided proximity-grasping screenshots and KAIST P2GI: add pre-contact hand-object relation to candidate phase-importance features. Useful signals include estimated object point cloud, hand-object distance, object center offset, object-size estimate, grasp-posture confidence, expected contact onset, and whether the controller is in approach / pre-shape / close / stabilize phase. Treat this as a metric/design reference, not a blocker requiring proximity hardware in DexGello v0.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from DexGello intro to corresponding TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Failure-data learning update 2026-06-13: DexGello should not treat all failed rollouts as negative examples to learn wholesale. The useful target is a phase-importance metric for long-horizon dexterous tasks: identify meaningful pre-failure stages worth imitating, downweight the actual failure stage, and use DAgger human-takeover segments as high-importance supervision. Example intuition: during grasp, object/contact metrics should spike; during rollout, human intervention/takeover marks that the current stage is important or risky.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from DexGello intro to corresponding TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
P2GI proximity update 2026-06-15: KAIST's proximity-perception grasping system is a useful reference for the failure/phase metric. It suggests explicit pre-contact features such as hand-object distance, center offset, object-size estimate, grasp-posture confidence, and contact-onset expectation. DexGello should record or estimate these features when possible, but proximity sensors are not a v0 blocker.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from DexGello intro to corresponding TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Long-horizon demo update 2026-06-13: candidate true-robot data sources for learn-from-failure are broom-to-dustpan sweeping and two 90-degree cube turns. They are deliberately longer than simple grasp demos and should expose phase boundaries such as tool grasp, alignment, sweep/rotation, stabilization, and final placement/orientation failure.

tasks.title: Long-horizon demo: 用扫帚把物体扫进撮箕
tasks.description: 为 DexGello / Learn-from-failure-data 准备一个较长 horizon 的真机 demo：机器人抓住小扫帚，把桌面上的轻物体 / debris proxy 扫进撮箕。前置采购 / 确认：桌面使用的小扫帚（软毛）和桌面使用的小撮箕。目标不是只看最终成功，而是产生可分阶段标注的成功/失败/接管轨迹，用来验证 phase-importance metric。建议阶段：approach broom、grasp broom、align with object、make contact、sweep toward dustpan、enter dustpan、settle / finish。验收：完成安全 tabletop setup 和物体/撮箕固定方案；完成 read-only 或仿真/dry-run；完成一次低速真机试验或明确硬件 blocker；记录视频、q_arm、T_hand、q_finger/Wuji state、object progress、contact/failure labels、human takeover/intervention；产出至少 1 条可用于 failure metric 离线打分的 episode。

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: Seeded from user request on 2026-06-13: Learn-from-failure-data needs longer-horizon real-robot demos, such as using a broom to sweep an object into a dustpan. Use this mainly to expose phase importance and learnable pre-failure segments.

tasks.title: Long-horizon demo: 魔方/方块连续拧两下 90 度
tasks.description: 为 DexGello / Learn-from-failure-data 准备一个紧凑但多阶段的灵巧手 demo：对低摩擦方块、带标记方块或安全 Rubik-style cube 连续完成两次 90 度转动。前置采购 / 确认：低摩擦方块、带标记方块，或安全 Rubik-style cube。任务目标不是解魔方，而是制造可观测的长一点 horizon：pregrasp、first 90-degree turn、stabilize/regrasp、second 90-degree turn、final orientation check。验收：选择安全低阻尼 cube 或 fixture，确认不会过载 Wuji 指尖/关节；定义视觉 orientation labels 和每个 90 度阶段的成功/失败判据；完成 read-only 或仿真/dry-run；完成一次低速真机试验或明确硬件 blocker；记录视频、手指状态、接触/滑移/错位、human takeover/intervention 和每阶段 metric 打分样例。

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: Seeded from user request on 2026-06-13: Learn-from-failure-data needs longer-horizon real-robot demos, such as turning a Rubik-style cube 90 degrees twice. Keep the goal as staged dexterous manipulation data, not cube solving.

tasks.title: Collect Cosmos3-policy RoboLab 3600 rollout corpus
tasks.description: 基于 Cosmos3-policy pretrained weights，收集 RoboLab 全任务 rollout 语料：120 tasks * 3 difficulties * 10 rollouts = 3600 rollouts。目标不是先做大规模 RL，而是先得到可审计的数据底座，用于单任务 fast self-improvement、memory-bank critic 和 lightweight adapter/head。验收：1) dataset manifest 包含 task_id、difficulty、seed、policy checkpoint / model version、action space、success/failure、episode length、observation/state retrieval key、log path、artifact path 和 checksum；2) 有 collection progress table，能看出 120*3*10 的覆盖和缺失项；3) 选出一个单任务 subset 用于快速自提升实验；4) 记录 GPU/RAM/运行时成本和失败原因；5) 不允许只靠计划或少量样例标记 done。
tasks.result: Closed on 2026-06-22 per Boris: Self-Improving Agents should keep only two active TODOs now, ArtiCraft3D / asset-graph expansion and RoboTwin2 Text2Env demo. This item is no longer an active TODO; preserve its previous notes as background/context.

This task tracks the actual corpus and metadata, not just the research direction.

comments.body:
Moved from Self-Improving intro to corresponding TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Cosmos3-policy / RoboLab execution update 2026-06-13: start from Cosmos3-policy pretrained weights, collect RoboLab rollouts across 120 tasks * 3 difficulties * 10 rollouts = 3600 rollouts, then test whether a single task can self-improve quickly before expanding the loop.

tasks.title: Design WAM test-time critic from rollout memory bank
tasks.description: 设计 WAM test-time critic 的 memory-bank 路线：从历史 rollout 中检索相似状态 / 相似 action context，用成功和失败轨迹估计当前 action/state 的质量、风险和不确定性，并把结果反馈给 Diagnosis/Analysis agent 与 test-time adaptation。验收：1) 定义 memory schema 和 retrieval key（视觉/state/action/语言/task context 哪些字段参与）；2) 实现或写出可运行 baseline 的 kNN/prototype retrieval；3) critic API 输出 score、uncertainty、nearest successes/failures、evidence window 和 data-requirement suggestion；4) 在 3600 rollout corpus 的一个 subset 上做离线评估，对比 no-memory / random retrieval；5) 记录失败案例，明确何时需要新数据而不是盲目更新 policy。
tasks.result: Closed on 2026-06-22 per Boris: Self-Improving Agents should keep only two active TODOs now, ArtiCraft3D / asset-graph expansion and RoboTwin2 Text2Env demo. This item is no longer an active TODO; preserve its previous notes as background/context.

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: Seeded from the 2026-06-13 group discussion: the critic is still under design. Candidate 1 is a database / memory bank that retrieves similar historical rollout states and uses success/failure trajectories for estimation. This is the first non-RL path to make WAM self-improvement auditable.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from Self-Improving intro to corresponding TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
WAM direction update 2026-06-13: the initial RL-based self-improving policy plan is no longer the first implementation path because full RL post-training looks compute-heavy and brittle for the current sim benchmarks. The near-term route is WAM self-improving: fuse test-time training / action adaptation with rollout memory instead of trying full RL post-training first.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from Self-Improving intro to corresponding TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Test-time critic plan 2026-06-13: the critic is still under design. Two concrete candidates are: 1) a database / memory bank that retrieves similar states from historical rollouts and estimates quality from success/failure trajectories; 2) a lightweight head or adapter trained on the 3600 RoboLab rollouts so Cosmos3-policy adapts to benchmark action distribution while test-time updates only the adapter or a small parameter subset.

tasks.title: Train lightweight Cosmos3-policy TTT adapter/head
tasks.description: 在不做完整 RL post-training 的前提下，为 Cosmos3-policy 训练轻量 head / adapter，使其先适配 RoboLab benchmark 的 action distribution；test time 只更新 adapter 或少量参数，并和 memory critic 联动。验收：1) 明确 adapter/head 结构、冻结参数范围和可更新参数量；2) 给出训练脚本/config、数据 split 和 4x L40S 内的显存/时间预算；3) 在 held-out rollout 或单任务 fast-improvement 实验上比较 base、adapter-only、memory-injected、adapter+memory；4) 写清 test-time update protocol、停止条件和回滚条件；5) 产出可复现日志/checkpoint/eval 表，不允许只写方案标记 done。
tasks.result: Closed on 2026-06-22 per Boris: Self-Improving Agents should keep only two active TODOs now, ArtiCraft3D / asset-graph expansion and RoboTwin2 Text2Env demo. This item is no longer an active TODO; preserve its previous notes as background/context.

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: Seeded from the 2026-06-13 group discussion: RL was considered but is expensive with the current four-L40S constraint. Candidate 2 is a lightweight module trained on the RoboLab rollout corpus so Cosmos3-policy can adapt to the benchmark action distribution, with test-time updates limited to an adapter or small parameter subset.

tasks.title: 搭建 RobotSeg/SAM3 + VACE 分层自动化管线 smoke
tasks.description:
根据 Zoom 与 2026-06-25/26/29/30 Layered Image Policy 微信同步，把分层处理从单图手工样例推进到可重复的自动化 smoke pipeline。Pipeline 顺序保持 iterative segment + inpaint：robot mask/rgba/video -> robot removal -> object/contact/occluder mask/rgba/video -> object/contact removal -> scene/background layer，所有输出保持原始 canvas 尺寸，支持原地 overlay/recomposition。

Segmentation front-end 更新：1) RobotSeg / RoboSeg (https://github.com/showlab/RobotSeg) 升为 MolmoAct/robot-layer segmentation 第一候选；群里 MolmoAct 测试反馈目前 RobotSeg 效果最好，且 RobotSeg 自带 image/video、arm/gripper/whole-robot fine-grained masks；2) P3 路线从这条总 smoke 中拆成单独 TODO：保持 SAM3 backbone，不回退到 SAM2.1，并把 RobotSeg 的 RobotPromptGenerator、MaskDecoder_Robot_RPG、arm/gripper/robot class token、memory foreground region prompt、part-aware mask decoder token path 迁移到 SAM3；3) gripper-first，arm 次之：SAM3 对 robot 整体已经更强，当前短板是 gripper / wrist-view part prior；4) SAM3/SAM2 继续作为 reference-mask propagation / mask tracking 备选：可先用干净 Franka reference 或第一帧 robot mask 初始化，再追踪整段视频；5) 参考 Cloak / arXiv:2606.22836 的 wrist-view end-effector mask 思路，单独评估 gripper-only、hand、arm+gripper 的 first-person/ego mask；6) SAM-HQ robot mask review 不如 SAM3，暂时排除；Qwen/RevealLayer 只保留为负例或完成 baseline。

Inpainting 更新：LaMa 群里测试效果不好，降级为 failure / negative baseline，不作为主路线；VACE 仍是 raster video inpaint 候选，但 2026-06-29 最新反馈是目前 inpaint 不稳定，因此必须加 judgement / retry / morphology QA 管线，不能直接批量信任输出；Gemini-Omni 明天先给 object/video edit 结果，作为 object removal / contact completion 的强 qualitative probe；FLUX.fill 保留为 still-frame fallback，GPT image 保留为强 still-frame baseline 但不作为视频方案。背景若基本静态，可在移除 robot/object layer 后尝试单次 image inpainting 生成 background plate，避免逐帧漂移；wrist/ego view 背景变化较大，需要单独记录 temporal consistency 风险。

Acceptance: 1) 选 3 个 UMI/MolmoAct/Hoi-style clips，每个抽 20-50 帧或短视频；2) 同一输入上比较 RobotSeg、RobotSeg+SAM3 modification、SAM3/SAM2 reference tracking、Cloak-style ego mask 的 robot/gripper/hand/arm masks，记录 mask IoU/edge quality/gripper coverage/bbox jitter/topology jump；3) 输出 robot/object/contact/occluder/background 的 mask.png、rgba.png、layer video、inpainted_background.png/video、SVG sidecar、layer_manifest.json；4) 对同一 mask/manifest 比较 VACE、Gemini-Omni、FLUX.fill、LaMa、GPT image baseline 的质量/速度/显存/是否改变画幅，其中 LaMa 和失败 VACE 输出作为 failure gallery；5) VACE/Gemini-Omni 输出必须检查 masked-region temporal consistency、unmasked-region preservation、recomposition SSIM/LPIPS 或人工评分，并记录是否需要自动重试或 mask morphology 修正；6) 失败样例包括 gripper miss、thin cable/shadow mistrace、pillow/object drift、background texture hallucination、电线等小细节可降权但 robot/object/background 主体必须正确分离。

Stage 2 VDDM framing update 2026-06-27: 这条 smoke pipeline 现在是 VDDM 论文的最小工程切片，而不是单纯分割/补全脚本。除 robot/MolmoAct/UMI/RoboTwin clips 外，加入 egocentric human-hand manipulation clips 作为跨域 probe；统一输出 actor_layer(actor_type=robot|human_hand)、object_contact_layer、occluder_tool_layer、scene_background_layer，以及 mask.png / rgba.png / layer video / SVG sidecar / depth or pointmap / mesh when available / tracks / contact events / layer_manifest.json。评估下游时接 HaWoR 与 Do-As-I-Do-style reconstruction stack（SAM3 -> SAM3D mesh -> MoGe pointmaps -> HaWoR -> TAPIR/BootsTAPIR/guided diffusion tracking -> projection/retargeting），判断 VDDM 是否让 reconstruction / tracking / retargeting 比 raw RGB 或 mask-only 更稳。新增 acceptance: 至少 3 个 robot clips + 3 个 egocentric human-hand clips；每类输出 recomposition QA、temporal consistency、actor/object/contact failure gallery、以及是否扩成 Stage 2 dataset/model 训练的判断。

comments.author: Codex / ClawCross wx sync

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from UMI intro to Stage 2 layered pipeline TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Layered Image Policy / ClawCross wx sync 2026-06-22: the group converged on comparing VACE and GPT image for layer completion because GPT image is strong for still frames but not video. Lai reported VACE testing underway, initially with SAM3+VACE, then SAM2.1 while SAM3 Hugging Face access was pending. Ziyang will try LaMa locally; ChatGPT web/API access remains a constraint for mainland accounts; FLUX.fill remains the recommended still inpaint candidate.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from UMI intro to Stage 2 layered pipeline TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Stage 2 layering conclusion 2026-06-22: use iterative segment + inpaint, not direct image-to-SVG or direct layer generation. Robot layer first, remove/inpaint the robot with FLUX.fill/VACE/LaMa/GPT-image baselines, then process task-relevant object/contact/occluder layers one by one, leaving a scene/background layer that should be nearly static for third-person/fixed-camera videos. The overlay/recomposition of all layers should match the source frame/video; wires and tiny cables are lower priority than correct robot/object/background separation.

comments.author: Codex / ClawCross wx sync
comments.body: 2026-06-26 Layered Image Policy sync: arXiv:2606.22836 / Cloak 的 wrist-view end-effector mask 很适合借鉴为 first-person gripper/hand/arm mask probe；LaMa inpainting 已被反馈效果不好，降为 failure baseline；如果 VACE masked V2V 能稳定做 video inpainting，则 VACE 直接作为 raster video inpaint 主线；RobotSeg 在 MolmoAct 测试反馈目前最好，升为 robot-layer segmentation 第一候选。

comments.author: Codex / ClawCross wx sync
comments.body: 2026-06-29 refreshed Layered Image Policy sync: 当前分割路线收敛到 RobotSeg/RoboSeg-first；下一步尝试把 RobotSeg 里的 SAM2.1 替换或对齐到 SAM3，专门看 gripper 和 ego/wrist masks。Inpaint 侧：VACE 当前测下来不稳定，必须加 judgement/retry/mask morphology QA 后才能批处理；Gemini-Omni 明天先给 object/video edit 结果；LaMa 保持负样例。

comments.author: Codex / ClawCross wx sync
comments.body: 2026-07-01 Layered Image Policy sync: P3 segmentation route should not fall back from SAM3 to SAM2.1. Keep SAM3 as the backbone because whole-robot recognition is stronger, and port RobotSeg/RoboSeg innovations onto it: RobotPromptGenerator, MaskDecoder_Robot_RPG, arm/gripper/robot class tokens, memory foreground region prompt, and part-aware mask-decoder token path. Initial target is gripper-specific part prior in propagation/decoder; arm comes second. Training should freeze SAM3 first and train only added RPG/robot-token/decoder-adapter modules, with optional low-LR mask-decoder or LoRA follow-up.

tasks.title: P3：把 RoboSeg 后端从 SAM2.1 迁移到 SAM3 backbone
tasks.description: 把 RobotSeg/RoboSeg 的 robot-specific 创新模块迁移到 SAM3，而不是退回 SAM2.1 或只做 SAM3 prompt 调参。路线：1) 保持 SAM3 backbone，冻结 backbone 作为第一版；2) 迁移 RobotPromptGenerator、MaskDecoder_Robot_RPG、arm / gripper / robot class token、memory foreground region prompt、part-aware mask decoder token path；3) 先做 gripper，arm 次之，因为 SAM3 对 robot 整体已经更强，当前主要短板是 gripper / wrist-view part prior；4) 先训练新增 RPG / robot-token / decoder adapter，必要时再用小学习率微调 mask decoder 或 LoRA；5) 明确和原始 RobotSeg(SAM2/SAM2.1)、原始 SAM3 tracking、SAM2.1 fallback 做同输入对比。Acceptance: 1) 写清 backend swap / adapter 的代码入口、配置、git SHA 或 patch diff；2) 在 3-5 个 MolmoAct / UMI / DaiMeng-style clips 上跑 20-50 帧或短视频，覆盖 third-person robot、wrist/ego gripper、arm+gripper；3) 输出 robot / gripper / arm masks、layer_manifest、recomposition preview、failure gallery；4) 记录 gripper coverage、edge quality、人审 IoU 或人工评分、frame-to-frame mask IoU/bbox jitter/topology jump、missing-gripper rate、false foreground rate、propagation drift；5) 给出是否把 SAM3+RobotSeg modules 作为 v0 segmentation mainline 的判断，以及不能进入主线时的 blocker。

comments.author: Codex / ClawCross wx sync
comments.body: Seeded from 2026-07-01 Layered Image Policy sync and P3 route screenshot: keep SAM3 backbone, port RobotSeg-specific modules instead of reverting to SAM2.1, focus first on gripper-specific prior, then arm, and train added modules before any low-LR mask-decoder/LoRA tuning.

tasks.title: 调研并重做 WAN2.2 action encoder / 注入路径
tasks.description: 根据 2026-06-22 Zoom 同步，当前 WAN2.2 action 控制没有解决：直接在输出头添加条件分支后，高噪声专家对 action 变化响应不明显；custom action encoder 未充分训练；部分指标可能变好但 actual/zero/wrong-row 行为仍不分离。下一步需要系统调研 WAN2.2 已有开源 action/control 注入方法，并重新设计 action encoder 与注入位置。候选包括 extend/control layer、LayerNorm/AdaLN 调制、cross-attention/action tokens、ControlNet-style branch、high-noise expert early injection、低噪专家细节修正、以及独立 state/action decoding head。Action 编码必须明确 8-D compact form（pos3 + quat4 + gripper）与当前 10-D continuous form（pos3 + rot6d + gripper），并单独 ablate gripper scaling / normalization；会议结论是当前 Cosmos-Predict2.5 seed 中不要默认归一化 gripper。Acceptance: 1) 一页 WAN2.2 action-injection 方法表，含可复用 repo/API、注入层、是否覆盖 high/low expert、训练成本；2) 现有 UMI action tensor schema 和归一化/不归一化对照；3) 一个可跑的最小改造方案或伪代码；4) 用 base/actual/zero/wrong-row/action-guidance gate 定义验收，不只看 MAE/MA；5) 明确是否继续 WAN2.2-A14B adapter，还是转入 Wan2.1/Gamma-style shared-world teacher。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-22 update: Motus-QKV 8卡 gate 已完成，4组 high/low Wan2.2-A14B 变体、rows 0/1/5/7/11、actual/zero/time_view_only/wrong-row 共80条推理，结果 0/20 gates passed，actual vs counterfactual MAE delta 全为0.0。结论：当前 QKV append 训练能生成视频，但 action/state 没有可测影响，不能继续只扩大同类 LoRA grid。Action encoder 下一版应从扁平99维向量改成结构化 encoder：per-dim dataset mean/std + modality-specific LayerNorm/RMSNorm（state/action/camera/gripper分开）+ action chunk temporal Transformer/TCN + view/camera token assembly，并并行测试 K/V-only cross-attn、AdaLN-zero block modulation、ControlNet-style residual branch。报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html；gate 可视化：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_motus_qkv_gate_20260622/index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-22 follow-up: 已在远端 DiffSynth-Studio 落地 Structured Motus-QKV ActionEncoderV2。UMI 99维条件按 make_condition_metadata.py 的真实布局分组：3(time/view)+16(state)+16(state_delta)+16(action_mean)+16(action_sum)+16(action_absmax)+16(action_last)。代码改动包括 UMIMotusActionQKV 的 group_dims/group_hidden_dim、训练参数、train_a14b_expert_overfit.sh 环境变量、validate_umi_a14b_pair.py checkpoint 自动重建、smoke_structured_action_encoder.py probe，以及 8卡 launcher scripts_umi/launch_a14b_motus_qkv_structured_grid8.sh。远端 smoke 通过：actual_vs_zero_qkv_mae=0.011469，actual_vs_wrong_qkv_mae=0.016007，restore_qkv_mae=0.0。下一步不应继续跑旧 flat encoder grid，而是在卡可用时运行 structured grid 后接 strict action gate。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 result: Structured Motus-QKV 8卡训练和 strict action gate 已跑完。4组 high/low Wan2.2-A14B checkpoint 全部到 step-128；gate 覆盖 rows 0/1/5/7/11，actual/zero/time_view_only/wrong-row 共80条推理。结果仍是 0/20 gates passed，所有 counterfactual MAE delta 仍为0.0。说明 structured LayerNorm/group encoder 解决了输入侧 QKV 敏感性，但 static action Q/K/V append 仍被 Wan sampled video path 忽略。下一步不要继续扩大 QKV append grid，应做 block hidden-state sensitivity probe，并改用更强注入：K/V-only cross-attention、AdaLN-zero modulation 或 ControlNet-style residual branch + wrong-action contrastive loss。报告：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_motus_qkv_structured_gate_20260623/index.html；总笔记：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 hidden/output probe finished for structured Motus-QKV g64_s02_lr1e5_r8 step-128. Probe uses same synthetic latent/timestep/context and paired dual-view batch semantics ([left,right] as batch, each 99-dim condition). High expert: action QKV MAE vs actual is zero 0.02476 / time-view-only 0.03119 / wrong-row 0.03070; block hidden delta grows to ~0.1886-0.1894 by block39, but final noise/output delta is only ~0.0065. Low expert: QKV delta ~0.0245-0.0312, block39 hidden delta ~0.1266-0.1273, final output delta ~0.0069. Diagnosis: action signal enters Wan hidden state, but static QKV append does not translate into strong denoising output or decoded video sensitivity. Next architecture should keep grouped LayerNorm action encoder, but move injection to stronger action-to-video cross-attn residual / AdaLN-zero block modulation / output-space control residual, with zero/wrong-row/time-view-only gate retained.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 engineering fix: UMIBlockModulationAdapter existed but WanModel.forward was not applying it. Patched diffsynth/models/wan_video_dit.py so each DiT block can receive UMI-conditioned AdaLN t_mod via umi_block_modulation_adapter.apply(...). Validation: remote py_compile passed; tiny WanModel smoke with nonzero AdaLN adapter gives actual-vs-zero output MAE 0.001438, proving the hook affects Wan output. Added scripts_umi/launch_a14b_paired_adaln_control_grid8.sh for the next 8-card run: paired_lr 99-dim condition, AdaLN block modulation, paired dual branch, wrong-condition + paired-branch contrastive, base preservation. Not launched yet because all 8 H20 GPUs are currently occupied by the Gamma/Cosmos2.5 training job.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 Action Encoder update for AdaLN route: upgraded UMIBlockModulationAdapter to support optional grouped action/state encoding. Default path remains old-checkpoint compatible; when group dims are set, the 99-dim UMI condition is split into 3,16,16,16,16,16,16 groups (time/view, state, state_delta, action_mean, action_sum, action_absmax, action_last), each with per-group LayerNorm + projection + fuse MLP before AdaLN block modulation. Patched examples/wanvideo/model_training/train.py, scripts_umi/train_a14b_expert_overfit.sh env passthrough, scripts_umi/validate_umi_a14b_pair.py checkpoint restore, and scripts_umi/launch_a14b_paired_adaln_control_grid8.sh defaults. Validations: local+remote py_compile, bash -n, train.py --help confirms new args, structured AdaLN smoke confirms group_dims_buffer round-trip with restore_apply_mae=0.0. 8-card training still not launched because Gamma/Cosmos2.5 is occupying all H20 GPUs.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 Action Encoder 调研补充：LayerNorm 是必要但不充分。UMI action/state 应按常见连续控制编码器做 dataset-level mean/std + modality/group-level LayerNorm/RMSNorm + action chunk temporal encoder + zero-init gated modulation。具体下一版优先级：1) 在 manifest/cache 旁生成 umi_stats.json，记录每维 mean/std、group name、clamp range；2) grouped AdaLN 保留 3,16,16,16,16,16,16 分组，但每组显式命名并可 ablate RMSNorm；3) 增加 raw action chunk Transformer/TCN，不只喂 99维统计量；4) 为 frame_idx/horizon_idx/history_future 加 sin/cos Fourier time features；5) 并行测试 K,V-only action cross-attention residual 与 AdaLN-zero，高噪声 expert early blocks 必须过 actual/zero/wrong-row hidden probe 和 decoded video gate。报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.body: 2026-06-23 UMI Action Encoder stats/schema update: 远端 scripts_umi/make_condition_metadata.py 已改成 canonical workdir / env-configurable 路径，并重跑生成 data/umi_wan_overfit/umi_stats.json。stats schema=umi-condition-stats.v2，feature_dim=99，recommended_group_dims=3,16,16,16,16,16,16；groups 明确为 meta_time_view(0:3 kept unscaled)、state(3:19 zscore)、state_delta(19:35)、action_mean(35:51)、action_sum(51:67)、action_absmax(67:83)、action_last(83:99)。条件 payload 验证：condition/raw_condition 均为 (13,99)，保留 raw 和 normalized 两份。这个修复把“LayerNorm 不够”的问题落到数据统计层：后续 grouped AdaLN / RMSNorm / action chunk Transformer 都可以基于 umi_stats.json 做可复现 ablation，而不是继续扁平 MLP。远端 py_compile 通过；本地 stats 副本和报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/stats/umi_stats.json 和 index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 Action Encoder norm ablation update: grouped AdaLN/Motus action encoders now support per-group normalization choices layernorm/rmsnorm/identity. Implemented local UMIRMSNorm in diffsynth/models/umi_condition.py, saved norm type via group_norm_type_buffer (0=LN,1=RMS,2=Identity), added train arg --umi_block_modulation_group_norm_type, env UMI_BLOCK_MODULATION_GROUP_NORM_TYPE, and validator checkpoint reconstruction. Gate RUN_IDS updated accordingly. Validation: train.py --help shows new arg; group_norm_smoke_ok [0,1,2]; remote py_compile and bash -n pass. comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 UMI Action Encoder implementation update: 根据 LayerNorm/RMSNorm/FiLM/AdaLN-zero 的调研，远端已把 paired AdaLN 8卡 grid 改成更直接的 encoder ablation：LN baseline、RMSNorm、Identity、LN+raw action chunk Transformer。metadata 已重新生成 raw temporal action chunks，当前 payload 验证 action_chunks=(13,4,16)、action_chunk_mask=(13,4)，同时保留 umi_stats.json 的 dataset-level mean/std 和 3,16,16,16,16,16,16 group schema。修复了 action-chunk helper 误挂到早期 context-token encoder 的问题，现在 UMIBlockModulationAdapter 可实际启用 chunk encoder；验证通过 py_compile、bash -n、metadata regeneration、LayerNorm/RMSNorm/Identity+chunk smoke。等待中的 watcher PID=292165 会在 8张 H20 空闲后自动运行更新后的 8卡 grid，并用 paired_adalnctrl_lnchunk_lr5e-05_b256_scale0p05_s1_r8_e4 作为第4组 strict gate。报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 prelaunch validation: paired AdaLN launcher 已加 DRY_RUN=1 模式并验证通过。dry run 生成 8 个 high/low job、4 个 unique run ids：LN baseline、RMSNorm、Identity、LN+raw action chunk Transformer；全部与 wait_run_a14b_paired_adaln_gate.sh 的 RUN_IDS 匹配，避免卡空后 gate 找不到 checkpoint。train.py --help 在 PYTHONPATH=$PWD 下确认 action_chunk 参数已暴露；bash -n / py_compile 仍通过。当前 Gamma/Cosmos2.5 仍占满 8 张 H20（约 28-30GB/卡，100% util），watcher PID=292165 继续每 5 分钟等待显存低于 8000MiB 后自动铺满 8 卡启动。报告已更新 dry-run 证据：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 new action-injection route: 在 AdaLN 之外，远端已实现 UMIActionCrossAttentionAdapter，作为更接近 Motus/Ctrl-World 的 action-to-video strong injection。它把 UMI action/state tokens 编成 action memory，让 Wan visual hidden tokens 在每个 DiT block 前 cross-attend 这组 memory，再通过 zero-init output projection + per-block gate 加回 hidden stream。改动：diffsynth/models/umi_condition.py 新增 adapter；wan_video_dit.py 接入 umi_action_cross_attn_adapter.apply(...)；train.py 增加 --enable_umi_action_cross_attention 及 group/norm/head 参数；train_a14b_expert_overfit.sh 增加 USE_UMI_ACTION_CROSS_ATTENTION=1 env passthrough；validate_umi_a14b_pair.py 支持 checkpoint restore。验证：py_compile / bash -n 通过；train.py --help 参数可见；tiny WanModel CPU smoke 关闭 flash-attn 后显示 zero-init noop_mae=0.0，手动打开输出层后 actual_vs_zero_mae=0.0001658、actual_vs_base_mae=0.00757。该路线尚未占 GPU 训练，作为 paired AdaLN + action chunk 后的下一候选；报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 action cross-attn queue prepared: 远端新增独立 8卡路线脚本，作为 AdaLN+action-chunk 若失败后的下一候选强注入方案。新增 scripts_umi/launch_a14b_paired_action_xattn_grid8.sh、scripts_umi/wait_run_a14b_paired_action_xattn_gate.sh、scripts_umi/wait_launch_a14b_paired_action_xattn.sh。该 launcher 使用 USE_UMI_ACTION_CROSS_ATTENTION=1，paired_lr high/low 各占一卡，4组 ablation：LN scale0.03、LN scale0.06、RMSNorm scale0.03、LN lr1e-5。dry-run 已验证：生成 8 个 high/low job、4 个 unique run ids，且全部匹配 gate RUN_IDS；bash -n 通过。当前没有启动这个 watcher，避免和已经等待中的 paired AdaLN watcher 抢卡。报告已更新 Action Cross-Attention 8-Card Queue 章节：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 encoder follow-up: 针对 UMI Action Encoder 又补了一轮常用编码器调研和工程化判断。结论：LayerNorm 是必要但不充分；连续机器人 action/state 应按 dataset mean/std + 物理语义分组 + LayerNorm/RMSNorm/Identity ablation + raw action chunk temporal encoder 来做，不能再把 99维 condition 当扁平 prompt。远端新增 scripts_umi/summarize_action_gate_and_recommend.py，可读取 records/gates 格式的 action-gate JSON，汇总 pass count、每个 run 的 actual MAE、actual-vs-zero/time-view-only/wrong-row delta，并在 gate 失败时给出下一条路线。已用旧 paired-xctx-control gate 验证：0/20 gates passed，自动建议切到 bash scripts_umi/wait_launch_a14b_paired_action_xattn.sh。报告同步更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 follow-up: 为 action encoder / injection 路线补齐自动判定闭环。远端 scripts_umi/wait_run_a14b_paired_adaln_gate.sh 和 scripts_umi/wait_run_a14b_paired_action_xattn_gate.sh 现在都会在 collect_dual_multitask_action_gate.py 后自动调用 scripts_umi/summarize_action_gate_and_recommend.py。AdaLN gate 会输出 paired_adaln_recommendation_${STAMP}.json；若 strict gate 不过，推荐启动 action cross-attn watcher。Action cross-attn gate 会输出 paired_action_xattn_recommendation_${STAMP}.json；若仍不过，明确转入 ControlNet-style action/state branch，而不是继续在同类 encoder/norm 参数上循环。验证：远端 bash -n 两个 gate 脚本通过；summarizer 用旧 paired-xctx-control metrics 验证为 0/20 gates passed 并正确给出切换建议。报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。当前 AdaLN watcher 仍存活，8 张 H20 仍被 Gamma/Cosmos2.5 占用，尚未开始 AdaLN grid。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 fallback implementation: 发现代码里已有 UMIBlockControlBranch / UMIPreBlockControlInjector 及 train/validate 参数，但 WanModel.forward 之前没有调用它们，因此 ControlNet-style fallback 实际未接入 denoising path。已修复 diffsynth/models/wan_video_dit.py：pre-block injector 在每个 DiT block 前注入 action/state residual，post-block block/gated control 在 block 后注入 residual；无 adapter 时路径不变，zero-init 时保持 exact no-op。新增 scripts_umi/smoke_block_control_injection.py，tiny CPU smoke 通过：pre-block/post-block zero-init actual_vs_base MAE=0.0，手动打开 projection 后 actual_vs_zero MAE 分别为 0.0007278 / 0.0007678。还新增 paired dual-view block-control fallback 队列：scripts_umi/launch_a14b_paired_block_control_grid8.sh、wait_run_a14b_paired_block_control_gate.sh、wait_launch_a14b_paired_block_control.sh；DRY_RUN=1 生成 8 个 high/low jobs，4 个 run ids 与 gate RUN_IDS 完全匹配。该路线暂不启动，作为 AdaLN 与 action-XAttn 都不过 strict gate 后的下一条 ControlNet-style action/state branch。报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 route-chain fix: action-XAttn gate 的 fallback 已从旧的 manual note 改为可执行命令 bash scripts_umi/wait_launch_a14b_paired_block_control.sh。现在路线链条是：AdaLN strict gate 不过 -> 推荐 action-XAttn watcher；action-XAttn strict gate 不过 -> 推荐 block-control watcher；block-control 仍不过 -> 再考虑数据/action schema 或 Wan2.1/Gamma-style shared-world teacher。已验证：wait_run_a14b_paired_action_xattn_gate.sh bash -n 通过；summarizer 用旧 paired-xctx-control metrics 生成 recommendation JSON，fallback_command 正确为 block-control watcher。报告同步更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。当前远端仍只有 AdaLN watcher 在等卡，未启动 XAttn 或 block-control。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 fallback runner refactor: 为避免 gate 脚本内嵌长 shell/here-doc 导致维护风险，新增远端 scripts_umi/maybe_run_gate_fallback.py，并把 wait_run_a14b_paired_adaln_gate.sh / wait_run_a14b_paired_action_xattn_gate.sh 改为在写完 LATEST 与 recommendation JSON 后调用该 runner。runner 行为：recommendation=continue_best_run 时不启动；recommendation=switch_route 且 AUTO_FALLBACK=1 时执行 fallback_command；AUTO_FALLBACK=0 时只打印 disabled。验证：py_compile runner 通过；两个 gate 脚本 bash -n 通过；自测覆盖 dry-run、disabled、switch-route execution、continue-best-run 四种路径。报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。当前远端仍只有 AdaLN watcher 在等卡，未误启动后续 watcher。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: Encoder 调研已补进本地报告：UMI Action Encoder 现在按 dataset mean/std + group-wise LayerNorm/RMSNorm/Identity ablation + raw action chunk Transformer + zero-init AdaLN/FiLM modulation 来组织。参考取舍：DiT/adaLN-Zero 支持 zero-init normalized modulation；ACT/Diffusion Policy 支持 action chunk/sequence encoder；RT-1/FAST 的离散 action tokenization 暂作为连续 encoder 全部 strict gate 失败后的备选，不作为当前第一路线。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 补齐 strict gate 报告链路：`build_paired_action_gate_report.py` 现在能把旧 metrics 的 legacy DiffSynth 路径映射到当前 canonical workdir，并用 symlink materialize actual / zero / time-view-only / wrong-row 的左右视角视频。`wait_run_a14b_paired_adaln_gate.sh`、`wait_run_a14b_paired_action_xattn_gate.sh`、`wait_run_a14b_paired_block_control_gate.sh` 都已接入自动 HTML report 生成，report 失败不阻断 fallback。远端验证：`py_compile`、三个 `bash -n`、旧 paired metrics smoke report、`preflight_acwm_action_routes.py` 全通过。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 新增无卡状态审计脚本 `scripts_umi/summarize_acwm_route_status.py`：汇总 `nvidia-smi`、AC-WM watcher/training 进程、AdaLN/XAttn/BlockControl 三条 route 的 step-64 high/low checkpoint readiness、latest metrics/recommendation/report，并写 `outputs_umi/action_gate/acwm_route_status_latest.json`。当前审计结果：8/8 H20 仍忙，只有 AdaLN launch watcher 存活；三条 route 均为 checkpoints 0/4、无 latest gate/report，说明 AdaLN 训练还未开始，不是 gate 跑失败。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 修复 checkpoint 导出关键问题：DiffSynth 默认只保存 `requires_grad=True` 参数，会丢掉 UMI adapter 的结构 buffers（如 `group_dims_buffer`、`group_norm_type_buffer`、`use_action_chunk_encoder_buffer`、`action_chunk_*_buffer`、`block_stride`、`use_x_context`），导致训练和 validate 结构可能不一致。已在 `WanTrainingModule.export_trainable_state_dict()` 中额外保留 `umi_*` 模块的非 trainable state/buffers，并新增 `scripts_umi/smoke_acwm_checkpoint_export.py` 验证。远端 smoke 通过：13 个 required buffers 都被导出，UMI trainable+buffer keys 共 137 个。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 encoder follow-up: 针对 UMI Action Encoder 补充了 LayerNorm/RMSNorm/Identity 调研和实现检查。当前建议 LayerNorm 作为默认，因为 paired left/right 小 batch、连续 action/state token 和短 action chunk 更需要 per-token 稳定归一化；RMSNorm 保留为幅值/均值信息 ablation，Identity 只做 z-score 是否足够的负对照。新增并运行远端 scripts_umi/smoke_paired_umi_condition_merge.py，直接调用真实 WanTrainingModule.merge_umi_conditions()；它发现 action_chunk_mask 原本被错误拼成 (26,4)，已修为 (2,13,4)。通过验证：condition=(2,13,99), action_chunks=(2,13,4,16), action_chunk_mask=(2,13,4)，left/right payload preserved exactly。报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 preflight hardening: 为保证后续训练不是只串行/半边专家，已扩展远端 scripts_umi/preflight_acwm_action_routes.py。现在会解析 AdaLN / Action-XAttn / BlockControl 三条 launcher 的 DRY_RUN=1 输出，断言每条 route 都 exactly 8 jobs、GPU ids 覆盖 0-7、每个 run_id 同时有 high/low 两个 expert，并继续检查 launcher run_ids 与 strict-gate RUN_IDS 一致。验证通过：AdaLN 8 jobs，Action-XAttn 8 jobs，BlockControl 8 jobs，均为 GPU 0-7 + high/low pairs。当前远端仍是 8/8 GPU 被 Gamma/Cosmos2.5 占用，AdaLN watcher 活着等待，尚无新 checkpoint/gate 结果。报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 gate hardening + AC-WM mapping: 进一步按 Motus / Dreamer / Ctrl-World / DreamDojo / PlayWorld 的 action-conditioned world model 要求约束当前 WAN2.2 路线：动作必须进入 dynamics path，双视角必须共享同一 scene/action context，评测必须用 counterfactual action gate。已修复远端 scripts_umi/collect_dual_multitask_action_gate.py 的 false-positive 风险：之前如果 zero/time_view_only/wrong-row 某个 summary 缺失，passed 可能仍保持 true；现在必须同时存在 zero、time_view_only、至少一个 wrongrow*，缺任一项都会 fail，并在 gate JSON 里记录 missing_modes。新增 scripts_umi/smoke_action_gate_required_modes.py，无卡验证通过：missing counterfactuals fail；complete counterfactuals can pass。preflight 仍通过，远端仍为 8/8 GPU 被现有 Gamma/Cosmos2.5 占用，AdaLN watcher 等待中，尚无新 checkpoint/gate 结果。报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 paired validation payload fix: 排查 strict gate 时发现 validate_umi_a14b_pair.py 在 --view dual_lr --lora-view paired_lr 下仍会按 packed dual_lr metadata 读取 umi_condition=(13,198)，而 paired_lr 训练 route 的 adapter 实际期望 left/right batch payload：condition=(2,13,99)、action_chunks=(2,13,4,16)、action_chunk_mask=(2,13,4)。已修复 validate：I2V/metrics 仍使用 dual_lr side-by-side GT video/prompt，但当 lora-view=paired_lr 时，UMI condition 改从 metadata_paired_lr_cond.csv 的 umi_condition_left/right 读取并合成 paired payload。同步修正 zero/time_view_only/left_zero/right_zero counterfactual，left/right 现在作用在 batch 0/1。新增 scripts_umi/smoke_validate_paired_condition_payload.py，无卡验证通过：actual preserves paired condition；zero/time_view_only 保持 paired shape；left/right branch counterfactuals operate on batch axis；wrong-row same shape but different payload。报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 training payload smoke: 为确认训练入口和 validate/gate 已经对齐，新增远端 scripts_umi/smoke_train_paired_lr_data_payload.py。该 smoke 直接用真实 UnifiedDataset 读取 data/umi_wan_overfit/metadata_paired_lr_cond.csv，再调用 WanTrainingModule.branch_data() 和 merge_umi_conditions()。验证通过：metadata row 包含 video_left/video_right/prompt_left/prompt_right/umi_condition_left/right；left/right branch 分别拿到对应视频和 prompt；merge 后 condition=(2,13,99)，action_chunks=(2,13,4,16)，action_chunk_mask=(2,13,4)，且左右 payload preserved exactly。结论：训练和刚修的 validate 现在都使用 left/right as batch items 的 paired action representation，不再是 packed 198-dim condition。报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 Motus source audit: 已直接 clone/read thu-ml/Motus 代码。核心结论：Motus 不是普通 action prompt/QKV append，而是独立 Action Expert：state/action MLP encoder + positional embeddings；action 也按 flow schedule 加噪并学习 action_noise-actions；每层 action AdaLN；action token 通过 wan_action_qkv 投到 WAN head space，WAN self-attn 接收 action_q/k/v 并回传 action/video outputs；最后有 action decoder 和 action loss。因此我们已失败的 Motus-QKV route 只近似了静态 QKV，缺 action denoising target、action decoder/loss、per-layer action-token dynamics。当前 AdaLN -> Action-XAttn -> BlockControl 作为低成本 graft 仍合理；若三条都过不了 strict gate，下一步不应继续 scale sweep，而应实现 Motus-like action-side denoising auxiliary head。远端设计 note: outputs_umi/action_gate/motus_to_umi_wan22_design_notes_20260623.md；报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 Motus-like fallback module: 现有 UMIActionStateConsistencyHead 只是从 video-flow prediction 解码 UMI summary token，不等价于 Motus 的 action-side denoising objective。因此新增远端 UMIActionDenoisingAuxHead（diffsynth/models/umi_condition.py）和 scripts_umi/smoke_action_denoising_aux_head.py，作为下一代 fallback 的最小可运行模块：输入 paired raw action_chunks=(2,13,4,16)、mask=(2,13,4)，对 action chunks 加噪并预测 noise-clean_action，输出 pred/target 同为 (2,13,4,16)。无卡 smoke 通过：loss finite=14.0844，output projection grad_norm=25.4831。当前不接入正在等待的 AdaLN/XAttn/BlockControl 8卡队列；如果三条 cheap graft route 都 strict gate fail，下一步应接这个 Motus-like action denoising aux head，而不是继续静态 QKV/scale sweep。报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 update: 按 UMI Action Encoder 调研结论，远端已把 Motus-style action denoising auxiliary head 真正接入训练 loss，而不只是单独 smoke。新增 _umi_action_denoising_aux_loss() 并接入 FlowMatchSFTLoss / FlowMatchSFTLossMemoryEfficient；train.py 新增 --enable_umi_action_denoising_aux_head、hidden/layers/heads/action_dim/max_chunk_len/loss_weight 参数；train_a14b_expert_overfit.sh 新增 USE_UMI_ACTION_DENOISING_AUX_HEAD 和 UMI_ACTION_DENOISING_LOSS_WEIGHT passthrough；preflight payload flag 也已覆盖。CPU smoke scripts_umi/smoke_action_denoising_loss_hook.py 通过：loss=39.9627, grad_norm=59.5423；route preflight 通过。Encoder 判断：LayerNorm 作为默认，RMSNorm/Identity 保留 ablation；真正路线是 dataset mean/std + semantic group norm + raw action chunk Transformer + zero-init AdaLN/cross-attn/control branch。当前任务仍保持 active，因为 strict action gate 尚未通过。Report: /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 correction/update: 复查发现独立 UMIActionDenoisingAuxHead 如果不和 video injection path 共享 encoder，只会训练旁路 action objective，不足以保证 Wan video path 更听 action。已修复：_umi_action_denoising_aux_loss() 现在优先调用 UMIBlockModulationAdapter.action_chunk_denoising_loss()；当 AdaLN/block modulation 启用 raw action chunk Transformer 时，aux loss 的梯度会进入同一套 action_chunk_input/action_chunk_pos/action_chunk_encoder。只有没有 shared adapter 时才回退到独立 aux head。新增 smoke_shared_action_denoising_loss.py 通过：loss=37.0939, shared_action_chunk_grad_norm=66.8337, fallback_aux_grad_norm=0.0。同时 8卡 AdaLN launcher 的第四个变体已从普通 lnchunk 改成 paired_adalnctrl_lnchunk_auxw0p05_lr5e-05_b256_scale0p05_s1_r8_e4，并同步 gate RUN_IDS；DRY_RUN 和 preflight 均通过。这版更接近 Motus 的 action-side objective：action denoising 不再只是旁路诊断，而是正则共享 video-control chunk encoder。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 shared-scene update: 复查 paired dual-view 路线后发现 UMIPairedDualBranchAdapter 已有 frame-pooled cross-view attention 分支，但 AdaLN launcher 之前没有启用，默认 attention_dim=0，左右视角更多是同位置 residual 交换。已更新 scripts_umi/launch_a14b_paired_adaln_control_grid8.sh：默认 UMI_PAIRED_DUAL_BRANCH_ATTENTION_DIM=256, UMI_PAIRED_DUAL_BRANCH_ATTENTION_HEADS=4，并透传到训练脚本。新增 smoke_paired_scene_hub_adapter.py 通过：zero-init noop_mae=0.0；手动打开输出层后 active_mae=0.01448，替换右视角会让左视角 delta 变化 0.00324。Dry-run 现在 8 个 AdaLN jobs 都显示 scene_attn=256，route preflight 通过。下一轮 AdaLN grid 因此不只是 action encoder ablation，而是 action-conditioned + shared-scene paired dual-view ablation。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 gate hardening: 修复 paired-output action gate 的假阳性风险。旧的 collect_paired_multitask_action_gate.py 在缺少某些 counterfactual 输出时可能仍把 available comparisons 判为 pass。现在每个 paired gate 必须同时具备 zero、time_view_only、至少一个 wrongrow*；缺项会写入 missing_modes 并强制 passed_available_gate=False。新增真实文件级 smoke_paired_action_gate_required_modes.py：缺 wrongrow 时 missing_wrongrow_passed=False；补齐 zero/time_view_only/wrongrow 且 delta 合格时 complete_passed=True。AC-WM route preflight 继续通过，远端当前仍是 8/8 H20 busy，AdaLN watcher 等待卡空。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-23 branch-level gate: A14B AdaLN / Action-XAttn / BlockControl 三条 wait-run gate 已增加 left_zero 和 right_zero 推理，并在 collect_dual_multitask_action_gate.py 增加 --require-branch-modes。后续 strict gate 不再只要求全局 zero/time_view_only/wrongrow，还必须证明单侧 left/right action 置零都比 actual 更差，避免左右腕只靠共享像素/历史帧生成而没有分支级动作控制。新增真实文件级 smoke_dual_action_gate_branch_modes.py：缺 left_zero/right_zero 时 missing_branch_passed=False；补齐全部 branch counterfactual 且 delta 合格时 complete_branch_passed=True。已验证三个 gate 脚本 mode loop 均为 actual zero time_view_only left_zero right_zero，并均传入 --require-branch-modes。远端仍 8/8 H20 busy，AdaLN watcher 等待卡空。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: UMI Action Encoder 调研补充：LayerNorm 仍作为默认 encoder norm，因为 paired UMI 是 small-batch 连续控制 token，能稳定每个语义组投影；RMSNorm 保留为幅值/均值保留 ablation；Identity 只做离线 z-score 是否足够的负对照。当前推荐路线是 dataset z-score -> semantic grouped norm/MLP -> raw action chunk Transformer -> zero-init AdaLN / action cross-attention / control branch。远端 preflight 已补硬检查：A14B gate 脚本必须包含 left_zero/right_zero 和 --require-branch-modes，否则不允许通过 route preflight。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: AC-WM route preflight 已进一步硬化：除了 8 卡 launcher/run-id/fallback 和 branch-level gate 外，现在还会实际运行 paired payload smoke，要求训练入口输出 condition=[2,13,99]、action_chunks=[2,13,4,16]、action_chunk_mask=[2,13,4]；同时静态检查 validate 路径必须读取 metadata_paired_lr_cond.csv，并支持 left_zero/right_zero 的 batch-axis action chunk zeroing。最新 preflight 已通过；当前远端 8/8 H20 仍满载，AdaLN watcher 还在等待空卡，三条 route 均尚无 checkpoint。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 发现并修复 AC-WM base-preservation 的一个真实覆盖漏洞：loss.py 的 _temporarily_disable_umi_modules 列表没有禁用 umi_action_cross_attn_adapter、umi_motus_action_qkv、umi_action_denoising_aux_head，部分 route 的 base-preservation target 可能不是纯 base Wan。已补齐列表并新增 smoke_base_preservation_disables_all_umi_modules.py；preflight 现在会跑这个 smoke。另把 shared action-denoising smoke 接入 preflight/audit，确认 Motus-like action denoising loss 训练共享 action chunk encoder，而不是 detached fallback head。最新 audit 两项均通过；目标仍未完成的唯一硬原因是还没有 route 通过 strict action gate。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 修复 strict branch gate 语义：collect_dual_multitask_action_gate.py 现在对 left_zero 使用 left_mae delta，对 right_zero 使用 right_mae delta，不再只用 whole-video MAE。新增/强化 smoke_dual_action_gate_branch_modes.py：缺 left/right branch modes 会 fail；whole-video MAE 变差但对应 branch MAE 没变差也会 fail；只有对应 branch MAE 真变差才 pass。preflight 和 completion audit 已把 branch_specific_delta 作为前置证据。最新 audit 仍 complete=false，唯一硬失败还是没有 route 通过 strict action gate。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: [encoder_norm_research_checkpoint_health_20260623] UMI Action Encoder 调研补充：默认路线定为 dataset z-score -> semantic grouped MLP -> LayerNorm -> raw action chunk Transformer -> zero-init AdaLN/FiLM/control branch；RMSNorm 保留作高吞吐/不减均值 ablation，Identity 只作 sanity check。已把 LayerNorm/RMSNorm/Identity 三路 smoke 接入 preflight，并补充 action-condition sensitivity smoke：actual/zero/time_view_only/wrongrow 在 AdaLN、Action-XAttn、BlockControl 三条 route encoder 中都产生非零 delta，同时 zero-init application 仍保持 base-preservation。新增 checkpoint adapter health probe：AdaLN gate 要求 blockmod+paired_dual_branch，Action-XAttn gate 要求 action_xattn+paired_dual_branch，BlockControl gate 要求 block_control+paired_dual_branch；该 probe 只证明 checkpoint 内 adapter 存在并被训练动，不等于 strict video action gate 通过。当前任务仍未完成：8 张 H20 仍被 Gamma/Cosmos2.5 job 占用，UMI watcher 在等卡，三条 route checkpoint 都还是 0/4。

comments.body: [acwm_action_injection_design_audit_20260623] 继续推进 UMI Action Encoder / AC-WM route：新增远端 scripts_umi/audit_acwm_action_injection_design.py，并接入 preflight_acwm_action_routes.py 与 audit_acwm_completion.py。该 audit 是静态结构检查，不替代视频 gate；它要求当前路线仍满足真正 action-conditioned WM 的最小工程定义：paired dual-view UMI payload、raw action_chunks/action_chunk_mask、Motus-like action-side denoising objective、zero-init/base preservation、branch-level actual/zero/time_view_only/left_zero/right_zero/wrongrow gate，以及 AdaLN -> Action-XAttn -> BlockControl escalation。验证结果：design audit passed，check_count=10；总 preflight 通过，paired_adaln/paired_action_xattn/paired_block_control 都是 8-job 覆盖 8 H20，高低噪声 expert 成对；completion audit 仍为 complete=false，因为目前没有 route 通过 strict action gate，且 Gamma/Cosmos2.5 仍占满 8 张 H20，UMI AdaLN watcher 正在等卡。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: [stateful_motus_action_tokens_20260623] 继续推进 UMI AC-WM action injection：旧 Motus-QKV 失败的一个核心差距是 action Q/K/V 每层都从同一个 condition 静态重算，Wan self-attention 后只保留 video tokens，action tokens 没有跨 block 更新。远端已补 stateful Motus fallback seam：UMIMotusActionQKV.init_action_tokens / qkv_from_tokens / update_action_tokens，并在 wan_video_dit 的 block loop 中保留 umi_motus_action_tokens；如果该 seam 存在，就用当前 action state 生成本层 Q/K/V，再用 block 后的 video hidden 更新 action state。新增 scripts_umi/smoke_motus_joint_action_tokens.py 并接入 preflight/completion audit。验证：zero_init_update_delta=0.0，enabled_update_delta=0.01333，video_conditioned_branch_delta=0.01780；action_injection_design_audit 现在 check_count=13。注意这仍只是结构和 smoke，不是完成证据；completion audit 仍 complete=false，原因是还没有任何 route 通过 strict action gate，Gamma/Cosmos2.5 仍占满 8 H20，UMI watcher 等卡。

comments.body: [encoder_norm_and_motus_joint_route_20260623] 关于 UMI Action Encoder：已把常用 norm/encoder 调研落到远端 preflight/completion audit。默认路线明确为 dataset stats -> semantic grouped encoder -> LayerNorm -> raw action chunk Transformer -> zero-init gated injection；RMSNorm 保留为不减均值/幅值 ablation，Identity 只作 sanity check。远端验证通过：action_encoder_norm_smoke norm_types=[layernorm,rmsnorm,identity]，default=LayerNorm+raw action chunk Transformer+shared action denoising aux loss，chunk config 与 launcher 对齐 dim=16 hidden=128 layers=2 heads=4，min action-condition delta≈0.0022259，zero-init apply delta 全为0。同时新增 paired_motus_joint 作为 AdaLN -> Action-XAttn -> BlockControl 后的 stateful Motus-style fallback route；preflight 现在检查四条 route，每条 8 job 覆盖 8 张 H20，design audit check_count=16。completion audit 仍 complete=false，唯一硬失败是尚无 route 通过 strict action gate；Gamma-World/Cosmos2.5 仍占满 8 卡，UMI watcher 正常等待。报告更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.body: wan22_action_encoder_redesign_paiworld_validator_20260623: 根据 2026-06-22 Zoom 反馈和 PAIWorld 技术路线，已把 WAN2.2 action encoder / injection redesign 写成远端 docs/wan22_action_injection_redesign.md，并接入 reference audits。结论：不再把 output-head 条件分支当主路线；继续四路线 AdaLN-zero -> K/V-only Action-XAttn -> ControlNet-style BlockControl -> Stateful Motus-Joint。新增明确 action schema 对照 compact8=pos3+quat4+gripper1、continuous10=pos3+rot6d+gripper1、legacy continuous16；gripper 默认 gripper_raw，不默认 z-score，单独 ablate gripper_scaled/gripper_zscore。PAIWorld 作为多视角几何一致性参考：当前 completion 仍是 left/right 双视角 UMI，Geo-RoPE / Geometry-aware Cross-view Attention / Latent 3D-REPA 作为后续 third-view/geometry probe extension。验证：reference_to_code_trace audit passed check_count=12；reference_alignment audit passed check_count=10；full preflight passed。另修复 build_paired_action_gate_report.py 支持 output_video，并新增 validate_paired_action_gate_artifacts.py；四条 strict gate 已接 validator --require-branch-modes，旧 Motus-QKV 回归验证 records=80/gates=20/video_refs=80。completion audit 当前唯一 blocker: no route has passed strict action gate with recommendation continue_best_run。报告：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html

comments.body: wan22_actual_action_schema_manifest_20260623: 为避免把文档里的 8D/10D 设计误认为实际训练已启用，已新增远端 scripts_umi/audit_umi_action_schema_manifest.py 并接入 preflight_acwm_action_routes.py。当前 AdaLN paired launcher dry-run 现在 8 个 jobs 都显式打印 action_schema=continuous16_legacy、gripper_norm=legacy_zscore；schema manifest 记录 condition_shape=[2,13,99]、action_chunks_shape=[2,13,4,16]、current_route_is_preferred_schema=false。结论：当前可跑路线仍是 opaque 16D legacy baseline / negative-control；compact8=pos3+quat4+gripper1 和 continuous10=pos3+rot6d+gripper1 需要上游提供 action_delta 字段映射或重新生成 manifest，默认 gripper_raw，再 ablate gripper_scaled/gripper_zscore。验证：audit_umi_action_schema_manifest.py passed；完整 preflight passed；本地报告已更新 /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html，证据 /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/acwm_status_20260623/umi_action_schema_manifest_latest.json。

comments.body: wan22_mapped_action_schema_builder_20260623: 已把 8D/10D action schema 从文档推进成可生成/可验证的数据路径。新增 scripts_umi/build_mapped_action_schema_conditions.py：给定权威 action_delta 字段映射后，可生成 compact8 或 continuous10 的 condition pickles、metadata CSV、stats JSON；compact8+gripper_raw 对应 UMI_CONDITION_DIM=67、GROUP_DIMS=3,16,16,8,8,8,8、ACTION_CHUNK_DIM=8；continuous10+gripper_raw 对应 UMI_CONDITION_DIM=75、GROUP_DIMS=3,16,16,10,10,10,10、ACTION_CHUNK_DIM=10。新增 smoke_mapped_action_schema_builder.py，用 mock mapping 只验证管线，不冒充真实语义映射；已 smoke compact8:gripper_raw、continuous10:gripper_raw、continuous10:gripper_scaled、continuous10:gripper_zscore。launch_a14b_paired_adaln_control_grid8.sh 现在支持 UMI_ACTION_SCHEMA / UMI_GRIPPER_NORMALIZATION 自动切换 metadata_suffix / condition_dim / group_dims / action_chunk_dim，legacy 默认保持不变。验证：schema smoke passed；完整 preflight passed；报告更新 /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html，证据 mapped_action_schema_smoke_latest.json。

comments.author: Codex
comments.body: wan22_action_delta_mapping_profile_20260623: 新增 scripts_umi/profile_umi_action_delta_mapping.py，对当前 cached UMI samples 的 opaque action_delta[16] 做 GPU-free 统计分析。样本：16 clips / 784 frames；统计 action_delta 与 state[t+1]-state[t] 的逐维相关、稀疏度、分位数和 candidate list。结果仅作 heuristic，不作为权威 schema：pose/state-delta-like top dims 为 9,11,1,10,13,2,14,3；稀疏/gripper-like top candidates 为 0,8,7,3,15，其中 0/8 near-zero fraction 约 0.62/0.61。这个结果说明 action_delta 很可能是 16D joint/state delta 风格而不是已经拆好的 pos/rot/gripper；下一步仍需要数据 owner 给出 action_delta[16] 字段顺序，然后用 build_mapped_action_schema_conditions.py 生成真实 continuous10_gripper_raw。验证：profile script passed；已接入完整 preflight，preflight_after_mapping_profile passed；报告更新 /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。
