comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from UMI intro to WAN2.2/action TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Wan2.2-A14B actprobe preservation sanity 2026-06-22: implemented and ran a cleaner frozen-backbone route with no LoRA and no output residual: no-x block-control + base-preservation weight 10.0 + action/state auxiliary decoder weight 0.2, while paired-dual branch scale was set to 0 so it only preserves paired left/right batching. Step-16 high/low checkpoints contain only umi_action_state_consistency_head, umi_block_control_branch, and umi_paired_dual_branch_adapter keys, with no LoRA or backbone weights. Row5 validation at steps=8/cfg=5/seed=1 is negative: base mean MAE 67.59 / PSNR 8.87; actual 70.30 / 8.61; zero 69.65 / 8.93; wrongrow0 71.46 / 8.45. Actual still fails the base-quality gate by +2.71 MAE and zero is better than actual. Single-step sensitivity probe confirms the action path is too weak: replacing actual condition with zero/wrong-row changes high expert predictions by only about 0.55-0.61% relative MAE and low expert by about 0.68-0.69%. Local report: ~/Downloads/umi_actprobe_preserve_20260622/index.html.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from UMI intro to WAN2.2/action TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Wan2.2-A14B inference-time action guidance breakthrough 2026-06-22: added `--action-guidance-scale` to `scripts_umi/validate_umi_a14b_paired.py`, using classifier-free-style UMI guidance `zero + scale * (actual - zero)` during denoising. On the preserve_ctrl_nox_row5_sanity16 checkpoint, normal actual inference was still weak (mean MAE 69.13), but action guidance scale 3.0 improved row5 to mean MAE 67.46 / PSNR 9.12, slightly better than base 67.59 and clearly better than zero 70.72 and wrongrow0 69.71. Scale 5.0 over-shot to MAE 68.22. This is the first row5 evidence that the learned actual-zero direction can be useful when amplified; the problem is not only wrong direction, but too-small action signal during standard sampling. Local report: ~/Downloads/umi_action_guidance_20260622/index.html.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from UMI intro to WAN2.2/action TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Wan2.2-A14B action-guidance 5-row gate 2026-06-22: ran action-guidance scale 3 on rows 0/1/5/7/11 for the preserve_ctrl_nox_row5_sanity16 checkpoint, then completed same-row base / normal actual / zero / wrong-row controls. Gate definition: guided actual must be within +1 MAE of base, and zero plus wrong-row must each be at least +1 MAE worse than guided actual. Result is 2/5 pass. Row0: base 36.58, actual 38.94, ag3 37.06, zero 37.49, wrong 37.07, fail because wrong-row gap is only +0.01. Row1: 56.80 / 58.37 / 58.39 / 58.43 / 58.87, fail. Row5: 67.59 / 69.13 / 67.46 / 70.72 / 69.71, pass. Row7: 71.39 / 70.92 / 69.17 / 72.17 / 70.61, pass. Row11: 38.56 / 39.03 / 40.51 / 39.24 / 39.54, fail. Local report with videos: ~/Downloads/umi_action_guidance_multirrow_20260622/index.html.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from UMI intro to WAN2.2/action TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Wan2.2-A14B multi-row seed result 2026-06-22: `preserve_ctrl_nox_multiclip_e4_s005_w5` finished high/low step-64 with full paired metadata (`METADATA_SUFFIX=cond`), frozen Wan backbone / DISABLE_LORA=1, no output residual, block-control + paired-dual branch scale 0.005, base-preservation weight 5.0. The 5-row action-guidance gate regressed to 1/5 pass, so this is not yet a transferable action-conditioned model. Row0: base 36.58, actual 36.37, ag3 38.09, zero 37.96, wrong 37.03, fail. Row1: 56.80 / 58.15 / 60.32 / 58.14 / 59.32, fail. Row5: 67.59 / 67.27 / 67.04 / 69.32 / 72.55, pass. Row7: 71.39 / 72.14 / 72.18 / 70.15 / 72.32, fail. Row11: 38.56 / 39.02 / 41.15 / 37.62 / 39.49, fail. Conclusion: row5-overfit action direction exists, but naive multi-row preserve-control training does not generalize.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from UMI intro to WAN2.2/action TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Stage 1 route correction 2026-06-22: do not treat this as ordinary Wan2.2 domain/style LoRA. The target is multi-view, action-conditioned, shared-world video modeling. The current Wan2.2-A14B line is only a local experiment on grafting action/state control into a frozen high/low expert backbone, mainly testing high-noise action-control adapters and action-guided sampling. It is not the full Shared-Backbone Dual-Branch Wan architecture yet. The stronger Stage 1 mainline should be Wan2.1 / Gamma-style multi-view teacher first: view axis or agent axis, view/camera/time/action tokens, shared scene hub tokens, cross-view communication, and bidirectional/full-context teacher before causal rollout. Wan2.2 should continue only as a controlled-adapter ablation with base-preservation and strict action gates.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from UMI intro to WAN2.2/action TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Wan2.2-A14B 8-card grid launched 2026-06-22: started `scripts_umi/launch_a14b_paired_agdir_grid8.sh` on the H20 node to keep all 8 GPUs occupied. The grid runs four high/low expert pairs: `agdir_p5_s005_c02_m005_e2`, `agdir_p5_s005_c05_m005_e2`, `agdir_p10_s005_c02_m005_e2`, and `agdir_p5_s003_c02_bc02_m005_e2`. All use full paired metadata, frozen backbone, no output residual, 2 epochs, save step 32; they scan base-preservation, control scale, global action-contrastive weight, and branch-contrastive weight. Initial check showed all GPUs busy and no OOM/Traceback; evaluation gate should run once all eight step-32 checkpoints exist.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from UMI intro to WAN2.2/action TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Wan2.2-A14B 8-card agdir grid result 2026-06-22: completed four high/low expert pairs on the H20 node and evaluated each with the same 5-row strict action gate over rows 0/1/5/7/11. Results: `agdir_p5_s005_c02_m005_e2` = 1/5 pass; `agdir_p5_s005_c05_m005_e2` = 2/5 pass; `agdir_p10_s005_c02_m005_e2` = 1/5 pass; `agdir_p5_s003_c02_bc02_m005_e2` = 1/5 pass. None beats the previous 2/5 row5-overfit action-guidance baseline. Failure pattern: action guidance often improves isolated rows but is unstable across tasks; row5 can catastrophically overshoot (for example agdir_p5_s005_c02_m005_e2 row5 AG3 mean MAE 79.89 vs base 67.59), while several rows fail because zero or wrong-row is not reliably worse than guided actual. Local report with 100 summaries and 200 videos: ~/Downloads/umi_agdir_gate_20260622/index.html.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from UMI intro to WAN2.2/action TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Action-to-future probe 2026-06-22: implemented `scripts_umi/probe_action_to_future_delta.py` to bypass Wan sampling and test whether paired left/right `13 x 99` condition tensors predict future visual deltas. On rows 0/1/5/7/11, `fit_all` passes 5/5 against zero, time/view-only, and wrong-next controls, so the condition contains usable future-change information. `leave_one_out` passes 0/5, so with the current 16-row dataset the signal is mostly memorized rather than transferable. Interpretation: action/state is not empty, but Stage 1 needs a real shared-world teacher / more synchronized data / explicit view-action-camera tokens before another Wan2.2 adapter sweep. Local report: ~/Downloads/umi_action_to_future_probe_20260622/index.html.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from UMI intro to WAN2.2/action TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Shared-world low-res teacher 2026-06-22: implemented and trained `scripts_umi/train_shared_world_teacher.py`, an explicit dual-view Stage 1 teacher with left/right first-frame encoders, paired action/state condition token, trainable shared scene hub tokens, Transformer cross-view communication, and separate left/right future-video decoders. Training used 8 H20 GPUs via `torchrun --nproc_per_node=8` on the 16 paired UMI clips, 64x64 resolution, 13 sampled frames, 1200 epochs; loss reached near zero and `teacher.pt` was saved under `outputs_umi/shared_world_teacher_20260622`. The 5-row action gate passes 5/5: row0 actual MSE 0.000001 with zero/time/wrong deltas 0.063503/0.043268/0.119002; row1 0.000000 with 0.047765/0.064991/0.176078; row5 0.000000 with 0.087883/0.098173/0.146533; row7 0.000000 with 0.109535/0.077232/0.115436; row11 0.000000 with 0.023760/0.038490/0.095674. This is the first positive runnable shared-world dual-view teacher: actual action/state controls low-res future video better than zero, time/view-only, and wrong-next controls. Limitation: it is an overfit 16-clip teacher, not yet a generalizing Wan/Gamma-scale model. Local report with 50 mp4 and 50 jpg assets: ~/Downloads/umi_shared_world_teacher_20260622/index.html.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from UMI intro to WAN2.2/action TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Zoom sync 2026-06-22 11:45-12:15: Stage 1 model work split into a Cosmos-Predict2.5 overfit seed and a WAN2.2 action-control line. The Cosmos-Predict2.5 run used 68 training clips and roughly overnight training with concatenated left/right image inputs; it looked useful but overfit after about 75 epochs and struggled on cloth-like scenes. The empirical action note from this run is to keep the 10-D continuous robot action unnormalized for now, especially gripper magnitude, because normalization degraded this pipeline.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from UMI intro to WAN2.2/action TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
Action encoding decision 2026-06-22: distinguish raw keyboard 10-D discrete controls from robot continuous action/state. The standard compact robot form is 8-D = position 3 + quaternion 4 + gripper 1, while the current UMI/Goword-style route uses 10-D = position 3 + 6D rotation representation + gripper 1. Haoyu should confirm the 2000-clip labels use the same convention before training; LayerNorm action injection is a candidate, but gripper scaling must be ablated instead of assumed.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body:
Moved from UMI intro to WAN2.2/action TODO during 2026-06-24 intro cleanup:
WAN2.2 action-injection status 2026-06-22: the initial output-head condition branch did not make the high-noise expert respond strongly to action changes. The next WAN2.2 experiment should modify the extend/control layer or another earlier control path, inspect open-source WAN2.2 action-injection recipes, and avoid relying on an untrained custom action encoder. Current symptom: adding a condition branch can improve the raw MA/MAE-looking metric while still failing action-control separation, so the gate must compare actual, zero, wrong-row, and base visual preservation.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-25 update: Wan2.2-A14B adapter routes are not sufficient (paired_adaln/block-control/Motus-Joint strict gates all 0/20; action-xattn rejected by checkpoint health). Pivoted to explicit shared-world teacher/data route. Built Gamma-World data_umi_robot189_v2 paired teacher datasets with left/right video + action npy + caption; patched teacher to infer condition_dim and added optional action-contrastive hinge. Results: gamma256 adjacent holdout 1/5, gamma256 spread holdout 3/5, gamma512 shuffle pure-MSE cross-task holdout 1/5, gamma512 shuffle + action-contrastive cross-task holdout 5/5 strict gate passed. Evidence: /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/teacher_gamma_20260625/gamma512_shuffle_contrast_holdout_eval/index.html. Next: use this explicit teacher as Stage-1 action-conditioned teacher target, then distill/transfer into Wan/Cosmos/Gamma-style dual-view video generation; do not keep blindly expanding Wan2.2 adapter grid.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-25 scale-up update: explicit shared-world teacher route now also tested at 2048 Gamma paired samples. Dataset: data_umi_robot189_v2 converted to 2048 paired left/right video + action condition samples; still highly Clutter-heavy (2009/2048), but holdout covered Clutter spread plus Cooking/Folding/Organize/Shoes tail rows. Result: gamma2048 shuffle + action-contrastive teacher got 8/9 strict action gates passed. The only fail is Cooking wrong-row delta (-0.00265); zero/time-view deltas remain positive. Added materialize_teacher_video_cache.py and UMI_VIDEO_CACHE_ROOT support because 8-card run is I/O/OpenCV-decode bound. Evidence: /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/teacher_gamma_20260625/gamma2048_shuffle_contrast_holdout_eval/index.html. Next: category-balanced / hard-negative teacher training, then distill teacher into Wan/Cosmos/Gamma dual-view generation.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-25 balanced Gamma teacher route: built data/umi_gamma_teacher_balanced_398 from Gamma-World UMI robot data with balanced category distribution (Clutter 199, Cooking 61, Folding 39, Organize 79, Shoes 20), cached 796 left/right videos, trained 8-card contrast teacher excluding 15 holdout rows. Strict action gate result: 9/15 pass. Category breakdown: Clutter 3/3, Cooking 2/3, Folding 1/3, Organize 1/3, Shoes 2/3. Evidence synced locally: /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/teacher_gamma_20260625/gamma_balanced398_contrast_holdout_eval/index.html. Interpretation: explicit teacher route is viable but small-category wrong-row failures remain; next step should be hard-negative mining / category-aware wrong-row selection before distilling into Wan/Cosmos/Gamma-style generator.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-25 hard-negative follow-up: patched the Gamma/shared-world teacher to support category-aware training/eval negatives (wrong_next, wrong_same_category, wrong_other_category). Ran two new 8-card balanced398 experiments. Results: hardneg multi-gate 7/15; allneg multi-gate 7/15. Allneg improved many individual deltas versus the earlier balanced contrast run, but strict multi-negative pass count is still below the earlier old-gate 9/15. Evidence: /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/teacher_gamma_20260625/gamma_balanced398_allneg_holdout_eval/index.html and updated total report /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html. Interpretation: explicit teacher route has real action signal, but current architecture still relies too much on first-frame/scene priors on small-category holdouts. Do not mark complete; next step is architecture-level action dominance, e.g. stronger condition injection into hub/decoder tokens or online hard-negative mining before distilling into Wan/Cosmos/Gamma generator.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-25 architecture ablation follow-up: patched explicit Gamma/shared-world teacher with stronger action injection variants. Added decoder FiLM and hub+decoder FiLM so action/state condition modulates video decoder hidden layers and optionally shared scene hub tokens. Ran 8-card balanced398 all-negative experiments. Results on strict multi-negative gate (zero + time-view + wrong_next + wrong_same_category + wrong_other_category): concat allneg 7/15; hub+decoder FiLM allneg 8/15; hub+decoder FiLM hardmax 6/15; decoder-only FiLM allneg 7/15. Best current route is hub+decoder FiLM allneg: Clutter 3/3, Cooking 2/3, Folding 1/3, Organize 1/3, Shoes 1/3. Evidence: /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/teacher_gamma_20260625/gamma_balanced398_filmhub_allneg_eval/index.html and updated total report /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html. Interpretation: architecture-level condition injection helps, but this is still not complete; wrong-next failures remain in Folding/Organize/Shoes. Next should move from low-res teacher validation into stronger temporal/action tokenization or generator distillation, not more plain Wan2.2 adapter grid.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body:
2026-06-26 update: 重新检查 Wan2.2 action-injection 线和 teacher 线。Wan2.2 paired block-control 与 Motus-Joint checkpoints 都健康，但 strict actual/zero/wrong-row/action-guidance gate 仍失败；Motus-Joint 结果为 0/20，输出对 zero/time-only/wrong-row 基本不分离，因此不再把它当作当前主路线。

有效进展来自 explicit shared-world teacher：已加入 temporal_action_tokens 条件注入，把 action/state 从 flatten global vector 改成 per-frame token sequence，接到 cross-view transformer context 并由 temporal frame decoder 使用。balanced Gamma/UMI strict multi-negative gate 从 hub+decoder FiLM 的 8/15 提升到 temporal_allneg 9/15、temporal_hardmax_w0.7 10/15、temporal_hardmax_w0.5 11/15。当前 best = temporal_action_tokens + hardmax w0.5；仍失败的主要是 Cooking row199/229、Organize row299、Shoes row397。

Evidence: /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html and evidence/teacher_gamma_20260625/gamma_balanced398_temporal_hardmax_w05_eval/index.html. Next: either targeted hard-negative/token work on the failing rows, or distill this teacher signal into the actual video generator. Do not mark done yet: this is a stronger action-sensitive teacher, not a completed action-conditioned dual-view UMI world model.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body: 2026-06-26 vview fast follow-up: Gamma-World stage2 已恢复并保存 iter_000000400 evidence。随后启动 shared-world teacher 的 vview_fast grid；由于 8 条候选明显 CPU-bound，其中 6 条停在 epoch0 附近，我只保留实际推进到 epoch100 的两条：vview_base_cw07_lr1e3 与 vview_failcat4_cw05_lr1e3。两条都训练到 epoch219 并保存 teacher.pt，也跑完 15-row balanced holdout strict gate。结果是 vview_base_cw07_lr1e3 = 0/15, avg actual MSE 0.057048, max counterfactual delta 5.59e-09；vview_failcat4_cw05_lr1e3 = 0/15, avg actual MSE 0.056805, max counterfactual delta 7.45e-09。actual / zero / time-view-only / wrong-next / wrong-same-category / wrong-other-category 输出基本数值相同，说明这个 vview conditioning path 被模型忽略，是 regression，不应继续沿这条 fast recipe 扩网格。当前 best 仍是 temporal action tokens hardmax w0.5 = 11/15。Local report updated: /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html, lightweight evidence: evidence/vview_fast_20260626/.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 explicit10 aux-condition follow-up: uploaded and ran `launch_shared_teacher_explicit10_aux_20260626.sh` on the H20 server as an 8-GPU DDP run. Route: 13D explicit `time/view + pos3 + rot6d + raw gripper` condition plus an auxiliary condition decoder (`--aux-condition-weight 0.1`) to force temporal action tokens to retain recoverable condition information. Training completed to epoch 99, loss 0.043099, and holdout eval finished on rows 0/99/198/199/229/259/260/279/298/299/338/377/378/388/397. Result: standard gate 9/15, extended task-aware nearest-condition gate 3/15 (passed rows 229, 298, 377), avg actual MSE 0.056195. This improves the extended gate by one row over explicit10_rawgripper but still does not beat current best `temporal_hardmax_w05` standard 11/15 and still fails most nearest same-task negatives. Conclusion: aux reconstruction is useful diagnostic pressure but not a complete solution; next route should use stronger task/state supervision or generator-facing action-control architecture, not more plain aux-loss sweeps. Evidence synced: `/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/explicit10_auxw0p1_20260626/`; report updated: `/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html`.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 explicit10 aux task-aware follow-up: after auxw0p1 reached standard 9/15 and extended 3/15, I ran a second 8-GPU DDP route `explicit10_aux_taskaware_20260626` that adds nearest task/category negatives directly into training (`zero,time_view_only,wrong_next,wrong_same_category,wrong_other_category,wrong_nearest_task_condition,wrong_nearest_same_category_condition`) while keeping the 13D explicit raw-gripper schema and aux condition decoder. Training completed to epoch 99, loss 0.043610, and eval finished on the same 15 holdout rows. Result: standard gate 9/15, extended task-aware gate 3/15, avg actual MSE 0.054096; extended pass set is still only rows 229, 298, 377. So nearest negatives in the same low-res teacher loss lower reconstruction MSE but do not improve action-conditioned separation. Current best remains `temporal_hardmax_w05` for standard gate (11/15), while explicit10+aux is only a diagnostic improvement for extended gate (3/15). Conclusion: stop plain aux/nearest-loss sweeps; next meaningful route should be richer trajectory/task-state supervision or generator-facing action-control architecture. Evidence synced: `/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/explicit10_aux_taskaware_20260626/`; report updated: `/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html`.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 view-specific action-token follow-up: implemented and ran `explicit10_viewtokens_20260626`, switching the explicit10/raw-gripper teacher from shared temporal action tokens to left/right view-specific temporal action tokens (`condition_injection=temporal_view_action_tokens`). 8-GPU DDP completed to epoch 99, loss 0.044298. Result on the same 15-row holdout: standard gate 10/15, extended task-aware nearest-condition gate 4/15, avg actual MSE 0.053586. This is the best explicit10 extended result so far and supports the architecture direction that dual-view rollout needs view-specific action/state paths, not only a shared action prompt. It still does not beat the old `temporal_hardmax_w05` standard gate 11/15 and remains incomplete. I also ran `explicit10_viewtokens_taskaware_20260626` with nearest task/category negatives included in training; it regressed to standard 8/15 and extended 3/15. So the gain comes from view-specific conditioning, not from harder nearest-negative loss. Evidence synced: `/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/explicit10_viewtokens_20260626/` and `/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/explicit10_viewtokens_taskaware_20260626/`; main report updated: `/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html`. Next route should build from view-specific action paths toward richer trajectory/task-state supervision or generator-facing action-control, not continue nearest-loss sweeps.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 follow-up: explicit10 temporal_view_action_skip 已在 8 卡 H20 上跑完并同步 evidence。这版使用 13D explicit pos3+rot6d+raw gripper、left/right view-specific temporal tokens，并把每视角 raw action condition skip 到 decoder。结果：standard gate 9/15，extended task-aware gate 2/15，avg actual MSE 0.052826；extended 只过 rows 260、298。结论：decoder action skip 降低重建 MSE，但削弱 nearest-task/category counterfactual separation；当前最佳 explicit10 仍是 temporal_view_action_tokens（standard 10/15，extended 4/15），不是 viewskip。本机报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html；evidence：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/explicit10_viewskip_20260626/。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 follow-up 2: 在 explicit10 viewtokens 当前最佳路线基础上，启动并完成 64px teacher rerun `explicit10_viewtokens_s64_20260626`。流程：materialize s64_f13 cache 796 videos -> 8-GPU DDP train to epoch99 -> same 15-row holdout gate。结果：standard gate 10/15，extended task-aware gate 2/15，avg actual MSE 0.060657；standard failures 198,229,299,378,397，extended 只过 260,298。结论：提高 teacher resolution 没有解决 nearest-task/category counterfactual separation；当前 best explicit10 仍是 32px `temporal_view_action_tokens`（standard 10/15, extended 4/15）。补充互补性分析：所有现有 teacher routes 的 oracle union 只有 standard 12/15、extended 7/15，说明下一步不该继续做单 route 小 sweep，而应转向 object/contact/per-frame richer supervision 或把互补 teacher 信号蒸馏回 generator-facing route。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 follow-up 3: 实现并完成一条更直接的 action-consistency 监督路线 `explicit10_viewtokens_videocond_20260626`。代码改动：在 `scripts_umi/train_shared_world_teacher.py` 加入 `VideoConditionReadout`，从 generated dual-view video 解码每帧 condition，并新增 `--video-condition-weight` / `--video-condition-gt-weight`。远端 smoke 已验证 readout 输出 `(B,13,26)`，readout 和 decoder 都有梯度；随后 8-GPU DDP 跑到 epoch99。结果：standard gate 8/15，extended task-aware gate 1/15，avg actual MSE 0.053282；extended 只过 row 298。结论：video-to-condition auxiliary 会改善重建/读出，但没有增强 actual vs zero/wrong-row/nearest-task 的分离，甚至比 32px viewtokens baseline 退化；因此下一步应上 object/contact/per-frame richer supervision 或 generator-facing distillation，而不是继续做 naive pixel-to-action auxiliary。报告已更新：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 follow-up: fixed the DDP failure introduced by the optional video-condition readout by making that module registered only when video_condition_weight > 0; remote smoke verified readout-disabled and readout-enabled paths. Reran explicit10_viewtokens_hardfamily_weighted_20260626 on 8x H20. Result: standard gate 8/15, extended task-aware gate 1/15, avg actual MSE 0.051863; extended pass row only 298. Oracle route union remains standard 12/15 and extended 7/15, so hard-family oversampling did not solve same-task nearest negatives. Evidence: /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/explicit10_viewtokens_hardfamily_weighted_20260626/ and updated index.html.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 capacity diagnostic: launched `explicit10_viewtokens_holdout_capacity_20260626` on 8x H20 with the 15 holdout rows intentionally included in training and extended nearest-task/category negatives included in contrast loss. This is not a generalization result, but it answers the capacity question: standard gate 15/15, extended task-aware gate 15/15, avg actual MSE 0.028490, min extended delta 0.005516. Interpretation: the current temporal_view_action_tokens shared-world teacher has enough capacity to separate the hard same-task rows when it has seen them; the failure mode is generalization to unseen near-neighbor actions, not an inability of the basic architecture to represent action-conditioned separation. Evidence synced under `/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/explicit10_viewtokens_holdout_capacity_20260626/`; local index.html and complementarity JSON updated.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 follow-up: tested `explicit10_viewtokens_hardfamily_taskaware_20260626`, which excludes the 15 holdout rows but combines hard-family sample weighting with extended nearest-task/category negatives in training. Result: standard gate 7/15, extended gate 2/15, avg actual MSE 0.053642; extended passes only rows 298 and 377, and oracle union remains standard 12/15 / extended 7/15. This confirms the 15/15 holdout-capacity result does not transfer by simply adding task-aware negatives plus family weighting. Current diagnosis: the architecture has capacity, but same-task near-neighbor generalization needs richer supervision or a different generator-facing distillation mechanism, not more small variants of the same contrast loss. Evidence synced under `/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/explicit10_viewtokens_hardfamily_taskaware_20260626/`.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 action representation test: implemented `--condition-transform relfirst_delta` in `scripts_umi/train_shared_world_teacher.py`, appending per-view relative-to-first and frame-delta action features to the original explicit10 condition. Remote smoke verified explicit10 dims: identity 26/frame, relfirst 46/frame, relfirst_delta 66/frame, with forward/backward passing. Trained `explicit10_viewtokens_relfirstdelta_20260626` on 8x H20 with holdout excluded. Result: standard gate 8/15, extended gate 0/15, avg actual MSE 0.061957; oracle union unchanged. Interpretation: simply making the raw action vector larger with relative/delta channels adds noise and does not solve same-task near-neighbor generalization. Evidence: `/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/explicit10_viewtokens_relfirstdelta_20260626/` and updated index.html.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 localized motion supervision test: added `motion_masked_dynamics_loss` and CLI flags `--motion-mask-weight/--motion-mask-floor` to `scripts_umi/train_shared_world_teacher.py`. This uses GT frame differences as a soft local motion/contact proxy and focuses dynamics loss on changing pixels. Remote smoke verified nonzero gradients. Trained `explicit10_viewtokens_motionmask_20260626` on 8x H20 with holdout excluded. Result: standard gate 7/15, extended gate 2/15, avg actual MSE 0.059468; oracle union unchanged. Interpretation: low-level motion-mask weighting alone does not solve same-task nearest-action generalization. Together with the global video-action contrast result, next step should use semantic/local structured supervision: object masks, robot/object/layer state, contact/motion labels, or a stronger generator-facing teacher rather than more global/vector losses. Evidence: `/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/explicit10_viewtokens_motionmask_20260626/`.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body:
2026-06-26 UMI action injection follow-up: added a motion-weighted local video/action contrast branch (`LocalMotionActionContrastHead`) on top of the explicit10 temporal-view-token teacher. Remote smoke tests passed, then trained `explicit10_viewtokens_localmotioncontrast_20260626` on 8x H20 with holdout rows excluded.

Strict gate result: standard 8/15, extended same-task/nearest-action gate 2/15, avg actual MSE 0.053592. Extended pass rows are 260 and 388. In the complementarity oracle this only adds row388, moving the holdout-excluded extended union from 7/15 to 8/15, still below the required action-conditioned dual-view gate. Evidence: `/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/explicit10_viewtokens_localmotioncontrast_20260626/` and `explicit10_route_complementarity_20260626.json`.

Interpretation: local motion/action contrast is useful as a diagnostic, but it does not solve action grounding. Current low-level proxy variants are saturated; next useful route should add semantic/local structure such as robot/object/background layer masks, object/contact motion state, or a stronger generator-facing teacher rather than another scalar action encoder tweak.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body:
2026-06-26 follow-up: implemented and tested a pseudo layer-aware action grounding route for the explicit teacher. Added `ResidualLayerActionContrastHead` to `scripts_umi/train_shared_world_teacher.py`: it subtracts the first frame from each future frame to form a robot/object/contact residual layer, appends GT motion masks as layer channels, pools foreground residual features, and contrasts that layer embedding against the action/state condition. Remote smoke passed on real UMI teacher data and checkpoint health confirmed the new head parameters are saved/nonzero.

8x H20 run `explicit10_viewtokens_residuallayer_20260626` completed. Strict holdout gate: standard 10/15, extended same-task/nearest-action 3/15, avg actual MSE 0.051503. Extended pass rows: 260, 298, 388. This improves over localmotioncontrast numerically, but it does not add a new row to the oracle union; holdout-excluded extended oracle remains 8/15. Evidence: `/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/explicit10_viewtokens_residuallayer_20260626/`, updated main report `/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html`, and updated complementarity JSON.

Conclusion: pseudo residual layer helps reconstruction and some standard gates, but still does not solve same-task hard action negatives. Next route should stop using only pixel/motion proxies and introduce real semantic object/contact/layer supervision or a stronger generator-facing teacher.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body:
2026-06-26 semantic-layer route update: implemented a real sidecar interface for layer-aware action grounding. Added `scripts_umi/make_semantic_layer_sidecars.py`, which generates per-clip `[2,T,3,H,W]` masks with foreground-change / contact-motion / background channels, and added `SemanticLayerActionContrastHead` to `scripts_umi/train_shared_world_teacher.py`. The training path now requires `--semantic-mask-root` when semantic-layer contrast is enabled, so it cannot silently fall back to pixel-only masks.

Generated 398 semantic layer sidecars at size32/frames13. Coverage mean: foreground-change 0.2005, contact-motion 0.1808, background 0.7423. Smoke train and checkpoint health passed, then 8x H20 run `explicit10_viewtokens_semanticlayer_20260626` completed.

Strict holdout gate: standard 9/15, extended same-task/nearest-action 4/15, avg actual MSE 0.052926. Extended pass rows: 229, 260, 298, 377. This validates the mask/layer supervision interface but does not improve beyond the baseline explicit10 view-token route; holdout-excluded extended oracle remains 8/15. Evidence: `/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/explicit10_viewtokens_semanticlayer_20260626/` and updated main report `/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html`.

Conclusion: automatic OpenCV layer sidecars are not enough. The useful next step is stronger SAM/robot-object/contact labels or a generator-facing teacher, not more pixel-only proxy masks.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 semantic-layer route: added explicit layer sidecars and SemanticLayerActionContrastHead. Generated 398 sidecars with foreground/contact/background channels; smoke and checkpoint health passed; 8x H20 run explicit10_viewtokens_semanticlayer_20260626 completed. Strict gate: standard 9/15, extended 4/15, avg MSE 0.052926; extended rows 229,260,298,377. This validates the mask/layer sidecar interface but does not beat the explicit10 baseline or improve oracle extended union, which remains 8/15. Evidence: /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/explicit10_viewtokens_semanticlayer_20260626/ and updated main report index.html. Next: stronger SAM/robot-object/contact labels or generator-facing teacher.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 semantic-layer task-aware rerun: trained explicit10_viewtokens_semanticlayer_taskaware_20260626 with the same foreground/contact/background sidecars plus nearest-task and nearest-category hard negatives in the training contrast loss. 8x H20 run completed. Strict gate regressed: standard 7/15, extended 3/15, avg MSE 0.057515; extended rows 298,377,388. Oracle extended union remains 8/15. Evidence: /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/explicit10_viewtokens_semanticlayer_taskaware_20260626/ and updated main report. Interpretation: hard negatives on weak OpenCV sidecars hurt reconstruction and do not fix action grounding; next step should use stronger SAM/robot-object/contact labels or generator-facing latent supervision.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 18:30 update: vview_fast 两个候选已完成 holdout gate，但均为 0/15；actual/zero/time-view/wrong-row 输出几乎完全相同（delta ~1e-8），判定为 conditioning path ignored，不继续沿 vview recipe 扫参。已同步证据到 /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/vview_fast_20260626/，report 已写入失败章节。下一步已启动 SAM-layer route：SAM ViT-B sidecar smoke 8 条通过（foreground 10.6%, contact 6.3%, background 89.4%），训练 smoke 1 epoch 正常保存 teacher.pt；现在远端正在生成全量 398 条 SAM sidecar，完成后自动接 8 卡 DDP 训练 explicit10_viewtokens_samlayer_20260626 + 15-row holdout gate。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 19:05 result: 新增 framewise action decoding supervision 并完整跑完。代码在远端 train_shared_world_teacher.py 新增 FramewiseActionDecodeHead：从生成的双视角视频逐帧解码 left/right action/state 序列；1-epoch smoke 通过，随后 8 卡 DDP 训练 explicit10_viewtokens_framewiseaction_20260626 完成。结果：loss 0.2232 -> 0.0702；standard gate 7/15（0,99,198,259,298,338,377）；extended nearest-task/category gate 1/15（298）；avg actual MSE 0.053913。结论：framewise video-to-action head 降低重建误差但进一步伤害 action gate，说明当前低分辨率 teacher 的视频读出辅助仍然不是正确的 action grounding 路径。证据与视频已同步到 /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/explicit10_viewtokens_framewiseaction_20260626/，主 report 已更新并通过 73 个本地链接校验。

comments.author: Codex
comments.body: 2026-06-26 23:00 result: model_fnfix compact action-xattn 8-card grid 完整跑完 strict action gate。4 个 high/low Wan2.2-A14B compact action-xattn candidates，rows 0/1/5/7/11，actual / zero / time-view-only / left-zero / right-zero / action-guidance / wrong-row 共 140 条推理；checkpoint health 和 artifact validation 均通过，说明 action-xattn 权重确实训练并且报告媒体完整。但 gate 结果仍为 0/20 passed。平均 counterfactual delta 很弱且不稳定：action_guidance +0.1024、zero +0.0347、left_zero +0.0281、time_view_only +0.0072、wrongrow0 +0.0043、wrongrow5 -0.0153、right_zero 0.0。最佳 run paired_actionxattn_model_fnfix_compact_rms_lr5e-05_h512_scale0p03_s4_heads4_gh32_mb24_r4_e4 也只有 0/5。Evidence synced locally: /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/paired_action_xattn_20260626_212747/report/index.html. Conclusion: model_fnfix action-xattn proves the injection path is no longer dead, but still does not produce a true action-conditioned dual-view world model. Do not mark this TODO done; next route should pivot away from incremental Wan2.2 adapter tweaks toward shared-world teacher / Gamma-style or architecture-level dual-branch training with explicit action-conditioned dynamics.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 23:15 result: shared-world teacher / explicit10_viewtokens 系列指标已补充解析。当前最强候选 shared_world_teacher_gamma_balanced398_explicit10_viewtokens_holdout_capacity_20260626 在 15 条 holdout rows 上 action gate = 15/15 passed，gate margin 0.005；平均 counterfactual delta: zero +0.0625, time-view +0.0454, wrong-next +0.0439, wrong-same-category +0.0527, wrong-other-category +0.0476, wrong-nearest-task +0.0264, wrong-nearest-same-category +0.0238。结论：Wan2.2 adapter routes 仍失败，但 shared-world teacher/ranking 路线已经能强分离 actual 与 counterfactual action，是下一步 teacher-to-generator / Gamma-style causal student 的主候选；不要把 15/15 误判为生成式 dual-view video model 已完成。Local evidence: /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/shared_teacher_explicit10_20260626/summary.json

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 23:25 correction: 上一条 shared-world teacher 结果需要按 capacity probe 解读。对应 launcher 明确写了 “holdout rows are included in training, not a generalization result”。因此 15/15 passed 证明的是小型 shared-world teacher 在容量足够、见过这些 eval rows 时可以学到 actual vs counterfactual action separation；它不是泛化验证，也不是生成式 dual-view video model 已完成。下一步应把它作为 architecture sanity check / teacher-to-generator 训练信号候选，同时需要另设真正未见 held-out rows 和 causal student/generator gate。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 23:30 progress: 已准备真正 unseen held-out teacher gate launcher。远端脚本 scripts_umi/launch_shared_teacher_explicit10_viewtokens_unseen_holdout_20260626.sh 会复用 capacity probe 的 15 条 rows，但训练时通过 --exclude-rows 0,99,198,199,229,259,260,279,298,299,338,377,378,388,397 明确排除这些 eval rows，eval 输出到 eval_unseen_holdout。预检结果：bash -n passed；DRY_RUN=1 打印正确 TRAIN_EXCLUDES；当前 Gamma-World 占满 8 卡时真实启动返回 75 并拒绝启动，guard 生效。下一步：等 Gamma stage2 释放 8 卡后先跑这个 unseen gate；只有 unseen gate 成立后再进入 teacher-to-generator / Gamma-style causal student。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 23:35 progress: unseen held-out split 已用远端 train_shared_world_teacher.py 的 parse_indices/complement_indices 做硬验证。数据集 metadata_paired_lr_cond.csv 共 398 条；holdout rows = 15；训练排除后 train rows = 383；train/eval intersection = []。本地证据已同步到 /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/shared_teacher_unseen_holdout_20260626/split_audit.json。Gamma stage2 仍占满 8 卡，最新约 iter 467，unseen launcher 暂不启动。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-26 23:35 monitor: Gamma stage2 仍在 8 卡 H20 上健康运行，最新 observed iter 476/2000，每步约 26s；目前只有 iter_000000400 checkpoint，没有 error/OOM/nan tail。DiffSynth unseen-holdout teacher gate 未启动，预计还需约 11 小时等 Gamma 到 2000 或释放 GPU。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-27 update: Gamma-World stage2 reached iter_000002000 (checkpoint time 10:40:33 CST) and final evidence was saved locally. Then ran shared-world teacher explicit10/viewtokens truly unseen holdout gate with rows 0,99,198,199,229,259,260,279,298,299,338,377,378,388,397 excluded from training (383 train rows, train/eval intersection empty). Result: 2/15 rows passed strict action gate (pass rows 229 and 377). This invalidates the earlier 15/15 capacity probe as generalization evidence. Failure mode: actual separates from zero/time/wrong-next on many rows, but nearest-task / nearest-same-category wrong conditions are often indistinguishable or better than actual. Recommendation: do not start teacher-to-generator / causal student yet; first improve teacher objective/split/capacity with hard nearest-condition negatives and rerun strict unseen gate.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-27 update: after Gamma stage2 reached iter_000002000, the true unseen shared-world teacher gate was re-tested with a stronger 8-GPU DDP ablation. Route: scripts_umi/launch_shared_teacher_unseen_strongcontrast_20260627.sh, same 15 held-out rows excluded from training, dim/layers/hubs increased from 256/4/4 to 512/6/8, contrast weight/margin increased from 0.5/0.003 to 3.0/0.01. Result improved from 2/15 to 4/15 strict action gates, pass rows 279, 298, 338, 377. Still not enough: nearest-task/category counterfactuals remain the dominant failure, and rows 229/259/397 still have wrong or zero controls beating actual. Evidence synced locally under /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/shared_teacher_unseen_strongcontrast_20260627/. Recommendation: do not start teacher-to-generator / causal-student from this teacher family yet; next route needs geometry/action-aware teacher target or explicit generator-facing action supervision.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-27 follow-up v2: controlled shared-temporal strongcontrast ablation completed. Same true unseen split and stronger capacity/contrast as viewtoken route; result also 4/15 strict gates, pass rows 279,298,299,338. Viewtoken strongcontrast was 4/15 with pass rows 279,298,338,377. These are complementary but both fail nearest-condition generalization, so current low-res pixel teacher family should not be used to launch teacher-to-generator/causal-student yet. Evidence: /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/shared_teacher_unseen_temporal_strongcontrast_20260627/.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-27 layer-aware gate update: after the true-unseen strongcontrast teacher routes capped at 4/15, I added a foreground/contact weighted layer gate on the same 15 held-out rows. Best diagnostic result is viewtokens_strongcontrast + layer gate = 7/15 passed (rows 0,260,279,298,299,338,377). shared-temporal strongcontrast = 5/15; semantic-layer = 6/15; semantic-layer task-aware = 4/15; SAM-layer = 2/15; residual-layer = 4/15. Readout: action signal is not zero and is more visible in foreground/contact regions, but nearest-condition counterfactuals still break many rows, so this is diagnostic progress, not completion. Evidence synced locally under /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/layer_gate_20260627/ and report updated at /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html. Next should move object/contact/layer weighting into generator-facing training objective or a geometry/action-aware teacher target, not another low-res RGB-only teacher sweep.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-27 layer-channel ablation follow-up: for the best viewtokens_strongcontrast teacher on the same true-unseen 15-row holdout, foreground-only scoring reaches 8/15 passed (rows 0,198,260,279,298,299,338,377), foreground/contact reaches 7/15, contact-only 6/15, and background-only 3/15. Interpretation: the action signal is concentrated in robot/object foreground regions rather than background shortcut, but same-task nearest-condition failures remain, so this is still not completion. Next concrete direction: make foreground/object/contact weighting part of the generator-facing training/eval objective or use a geometry/action-aware teacher target. Evidence: /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/layer_gate_20260627/.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-27 next run queued: implemented semantic-layer weighted reconstruction in train_shared_world_teacher.py (defaults off, backward-compatible): --semantic-layer-recon-weight, --semantic-layer-recon-channels, --semantic-layer-recon-floor. Added and launched watcher scripts_umi/wait_launch_shared_teacher_unseen_foreground_recon_20260627.sh. It waits until all 8 H20 GPUs are below 2GB, then starts 8-card DDP training for view-specific temporal action tokens + strongcontrast + foreground-weighted reconstruction, followed by standard gate and layer gates (foreground/foreground_contact/contact/background). Current status: watcher alive; GPU0 is still occupied by Gamma iter2000 inference, so training has not started yet.

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body:
2026-06-27 foreground-weighted teacher training 结果已收口：把 foreground/contact mask 直接放进 low-res teacher training objective 没有解决 action-conditioned generalization。

- foreground_recon：standard unseen gate 2/15；foreground 3/15；foreground/contact 3/15；contact 2/15；background 0/15。
- foreground_contrast：standard unseen gate 2/15；foreground 5/15；foreground/contact 3/15；contact 4/15；background 1/15。
- 对比此前 posthoc layer diagnostic：viewtokens_strongcontrast foreground-only 是 8/15，仍然是当前最好 foreground evidence。

结论：foreground weighting 会降低训练 loss，但没有超过后验 layer gate，也没有解决 same-task / nearest-condition counterfactual。下一步不建议继续堆同类 foreground loss；应转向更强的 action/geometry target，例如 3D/contact state、PAIWorld-style cross-view geometric communication，或先训练独立 action/ranker head 来处理 actual-vs-nearest counterfactual，再作为 generator-facing supervision。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body:
2026-06-27 追加 independent action-video ranker 诊断：这次不生成视频，只用 GT 双视角 rollout 的 dynamics/residual 表征去匹配 actual UMI action/state，并直接训练 actual score 高于 zero / time-view-only / wrong-row / same-task nearest / same-category nearest。

设置：balanced_398 数据，15 条 eval rows 完全从 train 排除，train/eval intersection=[]；size32，单卡预加载，200 epochs。训练 loss 从 2.3188 降到 0.0742，说明 train split 可拟合。

结果：true unseen rank gate 只有 1/15，只通过 row 0。多数失败 worst negative 是 wrong_nearest_same_category_condition 或 wrong_next，很多 row 的 actual score 甚至为负。

结论：问题不只是生成器或 reconstruction loss；当前 action schema + low-res video dynamics 本身没有学到可迁移的 actual-vs-nearest grounding。下一步不应直接把这个 ranker 当 reward head 蒸馏，也不建议继续堆同类 foreground loss。需要先增强 action/video grounding：object/contact/3D state、camera geometry、action-event labels，或 PAIWorld-style geometry-aware multi-view representation。ranker 脚本可以保留为后续新 schema 的快速验收器。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body:
2026-06-27 temporal alignment ranker 结果：在 independent action-video ranker 上新增 per-frame temporal score mode，不再只做 global pooled video/action embedding，而是把每帧 dual-view video dynamics embedding 和对应帧 action token embedding 做时间对齐打分。

设置仍是 balanced_398，15 条 eval rows 完全从 train 排除，train/eval intersection=[]；size32，200 epochs。训练 loss 降到 0.00051，说明 train ranking 极易拟合。

结果：true unseen rank gate 从 global pooled 的 1/15 提升到 4/15，通过 rows 229、299、338、388。这个改善说明 temporal alignment 比全局视频摘要更接近 action-conditioned dynamics；但 4/15 仍不足以作为 generator-facing reward/head。

结论：保留 temporal action-video alignment 作为后续组件，但当前 action schema + low-res video dynamics 仍没有解决 same-task / nearest-condition 泛化。下一步需要在 temporal alignment 上加入更强 grounding：object/contact/3D state、camera geometry、action-event labels，或 PAIWorld-style geometry-aware multi-view representation，然后再重跑 ranker gate。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-27 进展：structured temporal action-video ranker 已跑完。把 paired UMI condition 显式按真实 schema 拆成 left/right view + mean/sum/absmax/last action-stat tokens 后，held-out strict rank gate 从 global 1/15、flat temporal 4/15 提升到 8/15，通过 rows 0,99,198,229,259,260,299,338。证据已同步到本机 /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/action_video_ranker_structured_temporal_s32_20260627，并更新总报告 /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html。判断：显式 action schema + temporal alignment 有效，但仍不是 generator 过关；失败行仍被 wrong_next / wrong_same_category / wrong_other_category / nearest condition 击穿。下一步应把 structured temporal encoder 作为 generator-facing auxiliary head / teacher loss 候选，同时补 object/contact/3D/camera-geometry grounding。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-27 继续推进：已把 structured temporal action contrast 从诊断 ranker 接入 generator-facing shared-world teacher。实现位置：远端 DiffSynth-Studio/scripts_umi/train_shared_world_teacher.py，新增 auxiliary head 将 generated dual-view video dynamics 与 paired UMI condition 的 left/right + mean/sum/absmax/last action-stat tokens 做 per-frame InfoNCE，并带 GT-video calibration；新增启动脚本 scripts_umi/launch_shared_teacher_structured_temporal_action_20260627.sh。已完成 CPU smoke：rows 0,1、size 8、1 epoch，成功训练并保存 checkpoint。当前 8 卡仍被 Gamma Stage3 占用；自动化已更新为等待 Gamma Stage3 checkpoint/结束后启动 structured-temporal teacher 并跑 holdout gate。注意：这仍不是目标完成，必须等 strict action-conditioned dual-view generation gate 通过后才算。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-27 full run 结果：structured temporal action contrast 已接入 generator-facing shared-world teacher 并完成 8 卡训练/eval。训练正常收敛，loss 约 0.57 -> 0.098；但 holdout strict action generation gate 只有 2/15，通过 rows 0,279。证据已同步到 /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/shared_world_teacher_structured_temporal_action_20260627，并更新总报告 index.html。判断：诊断 ranker 的 8/15 没有直接转化为生成器控制；把 structured temporal encoder 作为旁路 auxiliary loss 不够，生成主干仍可走 reconstruction/task-appearance shortcut。下一步应把 structured action encoder 变成 latent bottleneck / decoder condition 主路径，或加入 object/contact/3D/camera-geometry grounding 后再做 generation gate。目标仍未完成。

comments.author: Codex dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-27 继续：structured main-path teacher 已完成 8 卡训练/eval。路线是把 structured action-stat tokens 放到 decoder condition 主路径（structured_temporal_view_action_skip），训练 loss 从 0.246 收敛到 0.0718，但 strict generation gate 仍只有 2/15，pass rows=0,198；证据已同步到 /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/shared_world_teacher_structured_mainpath_20260627/，本地报告 /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/index.html 已更新。结论：action encoder 结构化本身不是瓶颈，auxiliary 和 main-path 两条 generator-facing structured route 都是 2/15；下一步应转向 object/contact/3D/camera geometry、semantic layer 约束或 latent bottleneck/gated decoder，避免 reconstruction/task appearance shortcut 绕开 action。目标未完成，不能标 done。

comments.author: Codex dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-27 follow-up：structured auxiliary/main-path 两条 generator-facing route 都是 2/15 后，已准备下一条更强约束路线：scripts_umi/launch_shared_teacher_temporal_hardmax_layercontrast_20260627.sh。它保留当前最佳可信 temporal_hardmax_w05 主配置（历史 11/15），但把 hardmax counterfactual contrast 的训练 MSE 限到 foreground_contact semantic layer masks，目标是减少背景/外观 shortcut。脚本已同步远端并 bash -n 通过；当前 Gamma-World Stage3 占满 8 卡，脚本启动保护已验证会拒绝抢卡。已新建 heartbeat monitor，等 GPU 空出来后自动启动并把 metrics/evidence 同步回 Downloads 和 dashboard。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-27 strict-nearest 复评：旧 temporal_hardmax_w05 的 11/15 是弱 gate（只含 zero/time/wrong_next/same/other），不是最终 strict gate。我用同一个 checkpoint 重新跑 CPU-only eval，加入 wrong_nearest_task_condition 和 wrong_nearest_same_category_condition 后，结果只有 2/15，pass rows=0,279；证据已同步到 /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/temporal_hardmax_w05_strict_nearest_cpu_20260627/，总报告 index.html 已修正。结论：目前没有任何 generator route 证明真正 action-conditioned；下一条排队脚本 launch_shared_teacher_temporal_hardmax_layercontrast_20260627.sh 已修正为训练和评估都包含 nearest negatives，并使用 foreground_contact semantic layer masks 做 hardmax contrast。当前 Gamma-World Stage3 仍占满 8 卡，脚本启动保护正常，等空卡后运行。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-27 CPU smoke：已用 corrected layer-contrast route 做无 GPU 验证，确认 next route 的数据/参数链路可跑。设置：train rows 0,1,2,3，1 epoch，temporal_action_tokens，nearest negatives=zero/time/wrong_next/wrong_same_category/wrong_other_category/wrong_nearest_task_condition/wrong_nearest_same_category_condition，contrast-layer=foreground_contact，semantic masks=semantic_layer_masks_s32_f13_v1。结果：NEAREST_CONDITION_CACHE_READY same_task/same_category，loss=0.201043，checkpoint saved；证据同步到 /Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/smoke_temporal_hardmax_layercontrast_nearest_20260627/，报告已更新。当前 Gamma-World Stage3 仍占满 8 张 H20，full 8-card run 继续排队。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-27 gate audit：新增 scripts_umi/summarize_action_gate_metrics.py，用于自动区分 strict-nearest gate 和 weak non-nearest gate，并已对现有主要结果生成 outputs_umi/action_gate_summary_20260627.json。本地证据：/Users/boris/Downloads/umi_acwm_action_injection_20260622/evidence/action_gate_summary_20260627.json。审计结论：当前所有包含 nearest negatives 的 generator-facing route 最高只有 2/15；旧 temporal_hardmax_w05=11/15、contrast=9/15、temporal_allneg=9/15 都是 weak non-nearest gate，不能作为真正 action-conditioned 完成证据。报告 index.html 已加入 Strict Gate Audit。

comments.author: Vercel dashboard

comments.author: Codex dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-27 数据底座更新：远端已凑齐刚好 10,000 条 loader-visible UMI clips。严格口径不是 9,779；按 left/right video、left/right caption、left/right action 六类文件 intersection，原 data_umi_robot189_v2 是 9,777 条 complete clips。新数据根目录为 /root/autodl-tmp/umi-world-model-lab/external_repos/Gamma-World/data_umi_robot189_v3_10k，稳定 symlink 为 data_umi_robot189_10k。组成：9,777 条 v2 unique + 70 条 legacy unique + 153 条显式 __dup10k controlled duplicates；validation_10k.json 显示 complete_intersection=10000，action_stats.json 已按 20,000 个 left/right action files 重算。注意：这只是 Stage 1 训练数据底座准备；当前正在跑的 Gamma Stage3 仍指向 v2，后续新训练必须显式覆盖 dataloader_train.data_root=data_umi_robot189_10k。若保留 val_holdout_frac=0.06，10,000 是总 clips，不是 10,000 train split。

comments.author: Codex dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-27 Gamma-UMI 数据层修正：检查 Gamma robot loader 后发现，只要数据根目录存在 action_stats.json，就会默认归一化 10-D action，包括 gripper。为避免 gripper 尺度被 action_stats 吃掉，远端已给 LocalMultiviewRobotDataset / get_local_multiview_robot_loader 增加 normalize_action 与 normalize_gripper 开关；robot bidirectional teacher 和 self-forcing CFS robot config 显式设置 normalize_action=True、normalize_gripper=False。10k early-teacher Stage2/Stage3 ablation 启动脚本也显式加入 dataloader_train.normalize_action=true 与 dataloader_train.normalize_gripper=false，并通过 bash -n / py_compile / config import。注意：当前正在跑的 Stage3 是改动前启动的，不受影响；后续 10k ablation 和新 Gamma-UMI route 应使用该修正。

comments.author: Codex dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-28 progress: implemented and smoke-tested a stronger shared-world teacher route, structured_temporal_view_action_bottleneck. This route supports the explicit10 raw-gripper condition files (per-view 13-D: time + view one-hot + 10-D action) as well as 43-D action-stat conditions, and forces decoder global state through the shared hub while per-view structured action tokens become the frame condition path. CPU train smoke passed on rows 0,1 with loss=0.195244 and saved outputs_umi/smoke_structured_bottleneck_20260628/teacher.pt. CPU eval smoke on row 0 with wrong_next and wrong_nearest_task_condition also ran and produced a valid report, but gate was 0/1; this is plumbing evidence only, not quality evidence. Because Gamma Stage3 is still occupying all 8 H20 GPUs, I killed the old watcher that would have launched the weaker temporal_hardmax_layercontrast route and replaced it with runbooks/wait_stage3_then_structured_bottleneck_20260628.sh. New watcher PID 10965 observed Stage3 latest_iter=450 and will launch scripts_umi/launch_shared_teacher_structured_bottleneck_layercontrast_20260628.sh once Stage3 exits and all GPUs are free. Goal remains open: full strict-nearest actual/zero/time/wrong-row/nearest generation gate has not passed.

comments.author: Codex dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-28 follow-up: upgraded the queued shared-world route from plain structured_bottleneck + foreground_contact contrast to structured_temporal_view_action_bottleneck + action-dependent foreground_contact layer contrast/reconstruction. The new loss scales foreground_contact supervision by per-view pose/rot action activity while keeping gripper raw by default (gripper_weight=0.0), matching the current action-schema guardrail. Remote implementation added action-dependent semantic layer MSE/contrast args to scripts_umi/train_shared_world_teacher.py and updated scripts_umi/launch_shared_teacher_structured_bottleneck_layercontrast_20260628.sh to write outputs_umi/shared_world_teacher_gamma_balanced398_structured_bottleneck_actiondep_${STAMP}. CPU smoke at size 32 passed: nearest-condition cache ready, loss=0.193041, checkpoint outputs_umi/smoke_structured_bottleneck_actiondep_20260628/teacher.pt saved; eval smoke produced a valid report but gate=0/1, so this remains plumbing evidence only. Live monitor 2026-06-28T00:42+08 shows Gamma Stage3 still owns all 8 H20 GPUs, latest watcher observation iter=468, so the full 8-card strict-nearest gate has not started.

comments.author: Codex dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-28 queue fix: audited the remote post-Stage3 launcher before the full run starts. Found and fixed two operational issues: the action-dependent launcher was still using old LAYERCONTRAST DONE/FAILED marker names, and summarize_action_gate_metrics.py referenced a missing temporal_hardmax_layercontrast_20260627 metrics file. Patched remote scripts so the queued route now uses ACTION_TEACHER_STRUCTURED_BOTTLENECK_ACTIONDEP_20260628 markers and summarizes only existing strict-nearest baseline / structured_mainpath / structured_temporal_action metrics. Restarted patched watcher as PID 34171; it observed Gamma Stage3 latest_iter=479 and will launch the actiondep structured bottleneck route after GPUs free. This is queue hardening only; no new quality claim.

comments.author: Codex dashboard
comments.body: 2026-06-28 no-GPU progress while Stage3 occupies the H20s: built the 10k DiffSynth shared-world teacher root from Gamma data at data/umi_gamma_teacher_10k_explicit10_rawgripper. make_gamma_paired_teacher_dataset.py reports 10,000 pairs, 13 latent tokens, per-view 13-D explicit10 raw-gripper condition, paired dim 338. tasks.title: 跟进 Haoyu 2000 条数据 UMI 大规模微调结果
tasks.description: Haoyu 正在完成约 2000 条数据的标签标注，并计划几天内反馈第一版大规模微调结果。这个 TODO 跟踪从小规模 68 条 / 75 epoch overfit seed 到 2000 条数据的可泛化训练结果。需要确认数据字段、action 维度、action 编码、是否归一化、夹爪量纲、左右视角/主视角拼接或 dual-view 组织方式、train/val split、训练 backbone 与 trainable modules。Acceptance: 1) 2000 条数据 manifest 和标签完成状态；2) action schema 说明（8-D vs 10-D、quat vs rot6d、gripper 单位/范围、normalization 策略）；3) 训练配置、GPU/时长、checkpoint 路径；4) held-out gallery 与 GT/base/actual/zero/wrong-row 对照；5) 过拟合与泛化结论，尤其布料/电线/遮挡等失败场景；6) 是否进入下一轮 shared-world teacher / WAN2.2 action encoder 训练的决策。

comments.author: Codex / ClawCross wx sync
comments.body: 2026-06-24 Layered Image Policy sync: Haoyu 提到 UMI 视频 prompt 也需要设计，这两天在调；2000-clip 结果跟进时需要同时记录 prompt template / caption strategy，而不只看 checkpoint 指标。

tasks.title: Build OSS-gated IsaacSim benchmark intake matrix
tasks.description: Convert the Isaac Sim / Isaac Lab benchmark survey into a machine-readable AgenticSim intake matrix with an explicit open-source gate and Notion Reading List coverage audit. Seed report: docs/research/isaacsim-benchmarks-for-self-improving.md. Live Notion audit: docs/research/notion-reading-list-coverage.audit.json and .md; 348 pages fetched from Reading List root, 1 Notion API fetch error, 4,325 markdown links, 1,008 unique robotics/simulation-relevant URLs, and 11 unique Isaac/Omniverse-specific URLs. Broad catalog: docs/research/isaacsim-benchmark-catalog.seed.json (44 entries: 4 P0, 29 P1, 11 P2). Open-source gate: docs/research/isaacsim-benchmark-open-source-gate.seed.json and .md; regenerate with npm run gate:isaacsim-oss. Current gate admits 20 confirmed open-source sources (P0=3, P1=13, P2=4) and excludes 24 until license/source verification. Newly added from full Reading List/web pass: RoboVerse Platform, ASAP Humanoid Sim-to-Real Skill Stack, and SO-ARM100/101 Isaac Lab External Project. Latest verifier result: 65 source URLs checked, 62 OK; GitHub metadata checks 24/25 OK, 0 rate-limited; 23 structural issues remain, all unknown licenses; Dual-Sim public GitHub URL returns 404. Acceptance: only confirmed OSS entries may enter dashboard implementation or smoke work; unknown-license, documentation-only, paper-only, or missing-source entries remain discovery watchlist until proven open source.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body: Progress 2026-06-26: expanded docs/research/isaacsim-benchmark-catalog.seed.json from 19 to 35 entries. New coverage includes Lightwheel BenchHub, Isaac Lab Mimic/SkillGen, Isaac Sim Benchmark Services, Isaac Lab performance benchmarks, OmniDrones, SidewalkBench, NaVILA/VLN-CE-Isaac, VLNVerse, TacEx/UniVTAC, Re3Sim, AgentWorld, InfiniteWorld, RealMirror, RoboGate, AI-CPS industrial IsaacSim benchmark, and ORBIT legacy. Validation: json.tool passed; jq reports 35 entries (4 P0, 22 P1, 9 P2); npm run test:dashboard passed. Next: verify each source license/code/data, then build metadata-only verifier and P0 smoke plans.

comments.body: Progress 2026-06-26: added metadata verifier scripts/verify-isaacsim-benchmark-catalog.mjs and npm script verify:isaacsim-catalog. Catalog now has 40 entries (4 P0, 27 P1, 9 P2). Verifier output: 53 source URLs checked, 50 OK; 17 GitHub repos checked, 16 OK; 25 structural issues remain, mostly license unknown. Known weak links: public chengaopro/Dual-Sim 404, ResearchGate 403, HF Genie-Envisioner-Sim fetch failed. Next step: source-by-source license/code/data verification and P0 smoke-plan generation.

comments.author: Codex
comments.body: Progress 2026-06-26: verifier hardened for GitHub rate limits and transient URL failures. Added npm script verify:isaacsim-catalog plus generated verification JSON/Markdown. tasks.title: Reproduce Do-As-I-Do on Franka + Wuji and test tactile value
tasks.description:
把 Do-As-I-Do 作为真机 Engineering 复现实验，而不是只放 Survey：在 Franka + Wuji Hand 上复现“monocular human video -> hand-object reconstruction -> robot retargeting -> executable manipulation data”的链路，并专门做 tactile ablation，回答触觉在整条数据生成/retarget/执行链路中到底提供什么增益。

Reference: https://do-as-i-do.com/ ; arXiv 2606.19333 ; code: https://github.com/malik-group/do-as-i-do 。项目页面描述的核心步骤是从日常单目 RGB 人类视频重建 hand-object interaction，再用 sampling-based optimization retarget 到多指机器人手；我们的复现目标是把它落到 Franka + Wuji，而不是只停留在网页调研。

Acceptance: 1) 选 3-5 个可在 Wuji 上完成的短任务，至少包含一种刚体 grasp/manipulation 和一种接触敏感任务；2) 跑通 Do-As-I-Do 或等价 pipeline 的视频输入、3D object/hand reconstruction、retarget action、sim/real playback；3) 记录 Franka arm pose、Wuji joint/action、Wuji tactile、RGB/Depth/外参和对象状态的统一 schema；4) 做 no-tactile / tactile-observed / tactile-feedback 三组对照，比较成功率、接触时序、滑移/掉落、过大接触力、regrasp 次数、trajectory deviation；5) 明确触觉只作为 logging/evaluation、policy input、online correction、还是 retarget optimization constraint 时分别有什么价值；6) 输出失败样例和结论，回流到 Tactile-WAM / VTLA：触觉是否值得进入 video-to-touch / WAM 训练目标。

tasks.title: 实现 Universal Tactile Encoder v0
tasks.description: 基于 2026-06-26 戴盟 VTAM proposal，先实现可插拔 Universal Tactile Encoder：输入 Marker Flow / tactile image / 多指触觉序列，输出统一 z_tac latent。Acceptance: 数据 schema、训练配置、模型权重或最小 checkpoint、finger identity/contact-region positional encoding、future latent prediction/reconstruction 指标、slip/contact stability 相关性、可接入 VTAM/System-0 的推理接口。

tasks.title: 实现 Temporal Action-Token Shared-World Model v0
tasks.description: 把高效 VTAM 明确做成 Temporal Action-Token Shared-World Model，而不是普通视觉/触觉拼接。Token streams: visual tokens、tactile/contact tokens、temporal action tokens、shared-world tokens；预测 future tactile/contact latent、contact risk、action latent/chunk 和可选 video rollout。Acceptance: 架构图、输入/输出 schema、training objective、held-out actual/zero/wrong-action gate、tactile prediction error、contact timing error，以及和普通 cross-modal attention / video-first baseline 的 ablation。

tasks.title: 验证 fast contact/action rollout 推理加速
tasks.description: 按照 proposal 的 fast contact/action path：在线阶段不在每个 planning/control step 生成完整视频，优先预测 tactile/contact latent 与 action latent；复用 visual/layer latent cache，在 contact event / slip risk / force jump 附近触发 sparse compute，并尝试 teacher-student distillation。Acceptance: ms/step、Hz、VRAM、cache hit/encoder time、compute per contact event、teacher-student error、actual/zero/wrong-action gate、任务成功率或 contact-risk 精度损失表。

tasks.title: 接入 System-0 / System-1 主动接触控制 demo
tasks.description: 构建 proposal 里的双系统主动接触控制：System-1 以约 5-20 Hz 预测未来触觉/contact state、risk 和 action chunk；System-0 以 50-100 Hz 或更高频读取当前 tactile latent，对比目标 tactile latent 并输出 residual action，例如手指微位移、法向压力调节、切向滑移补偿、插接对准修正。Acceptance: 控制接口、latency/Hz 记录、安全力阈值、扰动恢复实验、滑移次数、恢复时间、任务成功率、失败案例。

tasks.title: Stage 2 VDDM: 加入 egocentric human-hand manipulation decomposition probe
tasks.description: 把 Stage 2 从 robot-only 分层扩展成 Video Dynamics Decomposition Model (VDDM) 的跨域验证：在 MolmoAct/UMI/RoboTwin robot clips 之外，加入 egocentric human-hand manipulation videos。统一 schema: actor_layer(actor_type=robot|human_hand)、object_contact_layer、occluder_tool_layer、scene_background_layer；sidecars 包括 mask.png、rgba.png、layer video、SVG contour、depth/pointmap、mesh/pose if available、2D/3D tracks、contact events、layer_manifest.json。实验路线：robot 侧用 RobotSeg/SAM3/SAM2 tracking + VACE/FLUX.fill/LaMa baseline；human-ego 侧参考 HaWoR 与 Do-As-I-Do pipeline，用 SAM3 -> SAM3D mesh -> MoGe pointmaps -> HaWoR -> TAPIR/BootsTAPIR or guided-diffusion tracking -> projection/retargeting 检查分层是否改善 reconstruction。Acceptance: 1) 3 个 robot clips + 3 个 egocentric human-hand clips；2) 每个 clip 输出四层 layer package 与 manifest；3) raw RGB vs mask-only vs VDDM layers 的 recomposition、temporal consistency、track/pose/reconstruction/retargeting 对比；4) failure gallery 覆盖手指/夹爪细节、透明/反光/布料/液体、遮挡接触、背景漂移；5) 判断 VDDM 是否足以支撑 Stage 2 独立论文与 v0 dataset/model 训练。

tasks.title: Stage 3 PhysisForcing：把 VDDM 分层结果变成物理约束视频生成监督
tasks.description:
把 PhysisForcing (https://dagroup-pku.github.io/PhysisForcing.github.io/) 明确接到 UMI Stage 3：不是把分层结果只当可视化标签，而是把 Stage 2/VDDM 输出的 scene/object-contact/robot layers 转成训练时的 physics_forcing sidecar，用来让 Wan/Cosmos/Gamma-style 视频 world model 生成更符合物理实际的机器人操作视频。

核心想法：PhysisForcing 通过 physics-informative regions 上的 pixel-level point trajectory alignment 和 semantic-level inter-region relation alignment 来减少物体变形、轨迹跳变、robot-object interaction 不一致。UMI 的优势是 VDDM 分层已经显式给出 robot mask/state/keypoints、object/contact mask/pose/point-flow/contact events、scene depth/camera/gravity priors 和 inter-layer relations，因此比整帧 RGB 或 mask-only 更适合构造 PhysisForcing 的监督区域与关系目标。

physics_forcing sidecar schema: 每个 clip/frame 输出 physics_mask(robot/object/contact/moved-object/static-scene)、point_tracks_2d/3d、object_state(pose/velocity/point_flow/confidence)、robot_state(keypoints/eef/gripper/pose/confidence)、contact_events(onset/maintain/release/confidence)、scene_priors(depth/pointmap/camera/gravity)、relation_graph(gripper-object coupling, pushed-object motion, object-scene support, occluder relation)、loss_weights 和 confidence_gate。低置信度 pose/flow/contact 不得强行作为 ground truth，只能降权或进入 failure gallery。

Training probe: 在同一视频 backbone / 同一 train-test split 下比较 4 条路线：1) whole-frame finetune；2) mask-only weighted loss；3) raw tracker/depth forcing without layers；4) VDDM layer+state forcing。PhysisForcing-style loss 先以离线特征/小规模 adapter 形式验证：pixel trajectory alignment 监督 DiT / video-token 局部运动连续性；semantic relation alignment 对齐 robot-object/contact/scene token relation，鼓励 grasped object 跟 gripper 保持耦合、pushed object 沿接触方向移动、scene/background 不漂移。

Acceptance: 1) 选 3-5 个 UMI/MolmoAct/RoboTwin/DaiMeng clips，复用 Stage 2 layer_manifest 并导出 physics_forcing sidecar；2) 写清 sidecar JSON schema、坐标系、confidence gate、loss weight 与失败条件；3) 跑一个最小同 backbone 消融或给出可运行训练配置，至少包含 whole-frame、mask-only、raw-tracker、VDDM layer+state 四组；4) 指标包含 object deformation / discontinuous trajectory、contact consistency、object pose/velocity outcome、robot-object coupling、background stability、action actual-vs-wrong separation、IDM/planner/reward utility；5) 输出对比视频、metric table、failure gallery、训练/评估命令、显存/速度/成本；6) 结论必须回答分层 sidecar 是否比 raw tracker/depth 或 mask-only 更适合作为 physics forcing，不允许只凭定性样例宣传。

comments.author: Codex / dashboard sync
comments.body: Seeded from Boris 2026-07-01 direction: use layered results to make video generation more physically realistic via PhysisForcing. Project page notes PhysisForcing is a training-time framework with physics-informative regions, pixel-level point-trajectory alignment, and semantic inter-region relation alignment; UMI should map VDDM layers into cleaner object/robot/contact/scene sidecars and compare same-backbone ablations instead of claiming an automatic gain.

tasks.title: 复现 GE-Sim 2.0，并设计触觉生成 / Tactile-WAM 化路径
tasks.description: GE-Sim 2.0 已开源，先作为 DaiMeng VTAM / Tactile-WAM 的第一条复现任务。Step 1: 跑通官方 GE-Sim-V2 repo、HuggingFace agibot-world/Genie-Envisioner-Sim-v2.0 checkpoint 和至少 1 个 G01 / OmniPicker-style action-conditioned multi-view rollout；记录环境、权重、显存、速度、输入动作格式、proprioceptive state expert、world judge 和 closed-loop rollout 是否可复现。Step 2: 思考并做最小 tactile extension：在 GE-Sim 的视觉/动作/本体状态 token 上增加 contact/tactile latent head，用 contact mask、gripper opening、force/torque、object pose/slip 或仿真 contact event 生成 pseudo tactile labels，预测 future tactile/contact latent、contact timing、slip/contact risk。Step 3: WAM 化：把输出从 video-only rollout 扩展成 <multi-view RGB/video latent, action tokens, proprio state, contact/tactile latent, world tokens> 的 state-action-contact rollout，并接 actual/zero/wrong-action gate 与 action head。Acceptance: 复现命令/配置、可运行 demo 或明确 blocker、1 页架构改造图、触觉 label schema、tactile/contact head loss、WAM state/action schema、actual/zero/wrong-action + contact timing + slip risk QA，以及和原 GE-Sim video-only baseline 的对照。

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: Seeded from GE-Sim 2.0 release: GitHub https://github.com/AgibotTech/GE-Sim-V2, HuggingFace https://huggingface.co/agibot-world/Genie-Envisioner-Sim-v2.0, project page https://ge-sim-v2.github.io/, arXiv https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.27491. The key VTAM angle is not just reproduction; add tactile/contact latent prediction and convert GE-Sim-style action-conditioned video simulation into a WAM state/action/contact rollout.

tasks.title: 测试 Gemini-Omni 视频编辑做 object inpaint / removal
tasks.description: 把 Gemini-Omni video editing 加入 UMI Stage 2 分层补全对照，专门测试“物品层移除 / object inpaint / contact-region completion”的效果。输入：3-5 个 MolmoAct / HOI / UMI-style clips，优先使用 RobotSeg/RoboSeg-first masks，并附带 SAM3/SAM2 tracked masks 与 layer_manifest。实验：对 object/contact layer 做 masked video editing，分别测试 object removal、object background completion、robot-object contact region completion；同一输入与 VACE、FLUX.fill still inpaint、LaMa、GPT/ChatGPT still edit baseline 对比。2026-06-29 最新同步：VACE 当前测下来 inpaint 不稳定，Gemini-Omni 结果要作为是否能替代或补充 VACE 的关键 qualitative probe，而不是另一个孤立 demo。Acceptance: 记录模型入口/API或网页流程、prompt/mask/reference 设置、输入视频+mask、输出视频、与 layer_manifest 对齐方式、masked-region temporal consistency、unmasked-region preservation、recomposition QA、物体边界/contact patch 失败样例、速度/成本/人工操作量；明确 Gemini-Omni 是否只适合作为 quick qualitative probe、是否能作为 VACE fallback、以及是否可进入 global layered dataset pipeline。

comments.author: Boris / Codex
comments.body: Seeded from user request: add a UMI World Model TODO to test Gemini-Omni video editing for object inpaint. Treat it as a Stage 2 raster video-editing baseline, not a replacement for VACE or mask/SVG sidecars.

comments.author: Codex / ClawCross wx sync
comments.body: 2026-06-29 Layered Image Policy sync: Lai will produce an Omni result next; compare it directly against unstable VACE outputs on the same RobotSeg/SAM masks. The decision is whether Gemini-Omni can be a fallback or qualitative probe for object removal/contact completion, not whether it replaces the segmentation layer pipeline.

tasks.title: 定义 Stage 1 闭环验证与 DaiMeng / AGI-World 混合 split
tasks.description: 根据 2026-06-28 与高晨的讨论，Stage 1 不能继续只按“再训练一个更大 shared-world / WAN / Gamma route”推进；算力和数据选择成本很高，下一步先把可反驳的闭环验证协议定义清楚。数据面：混合 DaiMeng UMI-style 数据、AGI-World，以及之前选用的 JianZhi / UMI 类数据，显式按 task、object、scene、embodiment、camera setup 拆 train / val / test，避免同任务近邻泄漏。验证面：明确在哪里比、和谁比、怎样算赢。Baseline 至少包括 copy-last-frame / first-frame hold、nearest-neighbor retrieval、wrist-only 或 D435-only predictive baseline、当前 best shared-world teacher / ranker、action-swapped counterfactual、generic interactive world model 直接喂 UMI 首帧的 negative baseline；不能只用“公开 interactive robot wrist world model 不存在”当成功证据。闭环指标：same-episode rollout fidelity、cross-view consistency、object/contact state prediction、action actual-vs-zero/wrong/nearest separation、planner/reward/IDM utility、以及跨 DaiMeng / AGI-World / JianZhi split 的 generalization。UMI 的跨本体优势假设要单独记录：视觉差距主要是夹爪 jaw / end-effector gap，且 wrist view 下 jaw 位置相对固定，所以可做 embodiment-gap ablation。

comments.author: Codex / ClawCross wx sync
comments.body: ClawCross 读取到 2026-06-28 高晨私聊更新：高晨提醒这个方向 cost 很高；如果目标只是提高 cross view，也可以在真机上先做；Boris 当前想先验证可行性，并计划混合 DaiMeng 数据集、AGI-World 和此前 JianZhi 数据，重新划分测试集和训练集。高晨指出闭环验证麻烦，核心是“怎么对比效果，在哪里比，baseline 是啥”。Boris 的假设是 UMI 跨本体相对容易，因为主要差异是夹爪 jaw 的 visual gap，且 jaw 在画面中位置固定；公开 interactive world model 直接喂 UMI 首帧会崩，但这应作为 negative baseline，而不是唯一成功标准。

comments.author: Codex dashboard
comments.body: Marked done on 2026-06-30 per Boris direction: Stage 1 will mainly use DaiMeng's own dataset as the core data substrate, so the DaiMeng / AGI-World / JianZhi mixed-split TODO is no longer an open execution gate. Keep the closed-loop validation and baseline list as intro-level framing; future dataset work should be spawned around DaiMeng-specific splits and eval.
